info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long ARM Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of ARM. The fund is an actively managed ETF. It invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of ARM, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 ARM 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 ARM 價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。它將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 ARM 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: OceanPal, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of shipping transportation services. It also specializes in the ownership of vessels. The firm transports iron ore, coal and grains, and minor bulks such as bauxite, phosphate and fertilizers. The company was founded on April 15, 2021 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
info.description_zh: OceanPal, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事提供船舶運輸服務。它還專注於船舶的所有權。該公司運輸鐵礦石、煤炭和穀物，以及鋁土礦、磷酸鹽和化肥等小宗散裝貨物。該公司成立於2021年4月15日，總部位於希臘雅典。

info.description: AST Spacemobile, Inc. engages in building a broadband cellular network in space to operate directly with standard, unmodified mobile devices based on an extensive IP and patent portfolio. It focuses on providing mobile broadband services with global coverage to all end-users, without the need to purchase special equipment. The company was founded by Abel Avellan on May 31, 2017 and is headquartered in Midland, TX.
info.description_zh: AST Spacemobile, Inc. 致力於在太空中建立寬頻蜂窩網絡，以便直接使用基於廣泛的 IP 和專利組合的標準、未經修改的行動裝置進行操作。它專注於向所有最終用戶提供覆蓋全球的行動寬頻服務，而無需購買特殊設備。該公司由 Abel Avellan 於 2017 年 5 月 31 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州米德蘭。

info.description: Rigetti Computing, Inc. provides full-stack quantum computing services. It serves global enterprise, government, and research clients through its Rigetti Quantum Cloud Services platform. The company was founded by Chad Rigetti in 2013 and is headquartered in Berkeley, CA.
info.description_zh: RigettiComputing,Inc.提供全端量子運算服務。它透過 Rigetti Quantum 雲端服務平台為全球企業、政府和研究客戶提供服務。該公司由 Chad Rigetti 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州柏克萊。

info.description: SuperX AI Technology Ltd. engages in providing artificial intelligence infrastructure solutions. It offers integrated systems that include computation, model hosting, data pipelines, and orchestration tools to facilitate enterprise AI deployment on a global scale. The company was founded on August 25, 2021, and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: SuperX AI Technology Ltd. 致力於提供人工智慧基礎設施解決方案。它提供包括運算、模型託管、資料管道和編排工具的整合系統，以促進全球範圍內的企業人工智慧部署。該公司成立於2021年8月25日，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Decoy Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a preclinical-stage biotechnology company. It engages in leveraging machine learning and AI tools alongside high-speed synthesis techniques to rapidly design, engineer and manufacture peptide conjugate drug candidates that target serious unmet medical needs. The company was founded by Frederick E. Pierce, Barbara Hibner, Peter Marschel, Michael Lipp, and Jodi Cooper in 2020 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Decoy Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家臨床前階段生物技術公司。它利用機器學習和人工智慧工具以及高速合成技術來快速設計、工程和製造針對嚴重未滿足的醫療需求的勝肽綴合物候選藥物。該公司由 Frederick E. Pierce、Barbara Hibner、Peter Marschel、Michael Lipp 和 Jodi Cooper 於 2020 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Caesarstone Ltd. operates as a multi material designer, producer and reseller of countertops used in residential and commercial buildings globally. It designs, develops, produces and source engineered quartz, natural stone and porcelain products that offer aesthetic appeal and functionality through a distinct variety of colors, styles, textures, and finishes used primarily as countertops, vanities, and other interior and exterior spaces. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Haifa, Israel.
info.description_zh: Caesarstone Ltd. 是一家多材料設計商、生產商和經銷商，產品用於全球住宅和商業建築的檯面。它設計、開發、生產和採購工程石英、天然石材和瓷器產品，這些產品透過獨特的各種顏色、款式、紋理和飾面提供美學吸引力和功能性，主要用作檯面、梳妝台和其他內部和外部空間。該公司成立於1987年，總部位於以色列海法。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long SPOT Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in the Underlying Security and financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of SPOT, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭現貨每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於標的證券和具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來提供 200% 每日槓桿敞口的 SPOT 價格，與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: DexCom, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the design, development, and commercialization of glucose monitoring systems for ambulatory use by people with diabetes. Its products include Dexcom G6, Dexcom G7, Dexcom Stelo, Dexcom Share, Dexcom Real-Time API, and Dexcom ONE. The company was founded by John F. Burd on May 13, 1999 and is headquartered in San Diego, CA.
info.description_zh: DexCom, Inc. 是一家醫療器材公司，致力於供糖尿病患者門診使用的血糖監測系統的設計、開發和商業化。其產品包括Dexcom G6、Dexcom G7、Dexcom Stelo、Dexcom Share、Dexcom Real-Time API和Dexcom ONE。該公司由 John F. Burd 於 1999 年 5 月 13 日創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州聖地亞哥。

info.description: HighPeak Energy, Inc. is an independent oil and natural gas company, which engages in the acquisition, development and production of oil, natural gas and NGL reserves. The company's assets are primarily located in the Howard County area of the Midland Basin. The company was founded on October 29, 2019 and is headquartered in Fort Worth, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: HighPeak Energy, Inc.是一家獨立的石油和天然氣公司，從事石油、天然氣和液化天然氣儲量的收購、開發和生產。該公司的資產主要位於米德蘭盆地的霍華德縣地區。該公司成立於2019年10月29日，總部位於德克薩斯州沃斯堡。

info.description: Arqit Quantum, Inc. engages in the provision of cybersecurity services via satellite and terrestrial forms. Its product is QuantumCloud which secures devices with cloud-based quantum encryption. The company was founded by David John Williams and David James Bestwick on April 26, 2021 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Arqit Quantum, Inc. 致力於透過衛星和地面形式提供網路安全服務。其產品是 QuantumCloud，它透過基於雲端的量子加密來保護設備。該公司由 David John Williams 和 David James Bestwick 於 2021 年 4 月 26 日創立，總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: Central Plains Bancshares, Inc. engages in the offering of sale of shares of its common stock in connection with the conversion of Home Federal Savings from a mutual savings association to a stock savings association. The company was founded on June 13, 2023 and is headquartered in Grand Island, NE.
info.description_zh: Central Plains Bancshares, Inc. 從事與 Home Federal Savings 從互助儲蓄協會轉變為股票儲蓄協會有關的普通股股份發售。該公司成立於2023年6月13日，總部位於內布拉斯加州格蘭德島。

info.description: Fair Isaac Corp. engages in the provision of decision management solutions. It operates through the Software and Scores segments. The Software segment includes pre-configured analytic and decision management solutions designed for a specific type of business need or process. The Scores segment focuses on business-to-business scoring solutions and services, business-to-consumer scoring solutions and services including myFICO solutions for consumers and associated professional services. The company was founded by Bill Fair and Earl Isaac in 1956 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Fair Isaac Corp. 從事提供決策管理解決方案。它透過軟體和分數部門運作。軟體部分包括專為特定類型的業務需求或流程而設計的預先配置分析和決策管理解決方案。 Scores 部門專注於企業對企業評分解決方案和服務、企業對消費者評分解決方案和服務，包括面向消費者的 myFICO 解決方案和相關專業服務。該公司由 Bill Fair 和 Earl Isaac 於 1956 年創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: OPKO Health, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical and diagnostics company, which engages in the provision of healthcare services. It operates through the Diagnostics and Pharmaceuticals segments. The Diagnostics segment manages the clinical laboratory operations of BioReference, as well as point-of-care operations. The Pharmaceuticals segment includes pharmaceutical operations in Chile, Mexico, Ireland, Israel, and Spain and pharmaceutical research and development operations. The company was founded in October 1991 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: OPKO Health, Inc.是一家生物製藥和診斷公司，提供醫療保健服務。它透過診斷和製藥部門運作。診斷部門管理 BioReference 的臨床實驗室運作以及護理點運作。製藥部門包括在智利、墨西哥、愛爾蘭、以色列和西班牙的製藥業務以及藥品研發業務。該公司成立於 1991 年 10 月，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. engages in providing capital solutions to commercial real estate markets. It focuses on assets such as multifamily, for-sale condominiums, industrial, retail, office, hospitality, and select specialty-use. The company was founded by Leonard Mark Tannenbaum on August 28, 2023 and is headquartered in West Palm Beach, FL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 抵押貸款
info.description_zh: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. 致力於為商業房地產市場提供資本解決方案。它專注於多戶住宅、待售公寓、工業、零售、辦公、酒店和精選專業用途等資產。該公司由 Leonard Mark Tannenbaum 於 2023 年 8 月 28 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州西棕櫚灘。

info.description: Paychex, Inc. engages in the provision of human capital management solutions for payroll, human resources, insurance, and retirement for small and medium-sized businesses. Its solutions include payroll services, hiring services, business insurance, time and attendance, employee benefits, finance and payments, human resources services, and startup services. The company was founded by Blase Thomas Golisano in 1971 and is headquartered in Rochester, NY.
info.description_zh: Paychex, Inc. 致力於為中小型企業提供薪資、人力資源、保險和退休方面的人力資本管理解決方案。其解決方案包括薪資服務、招聘服務、商業保險、考勤、員工福利、財務和支付、人力資源服務和創業服務。該公司由 Blase Thomas Golisano 於 1971 年創立，總部位於紐約州羅徹斯特。

info.description: Landstar System, Inc. engages in the provision of transportation management solutions. It operates through the following segments: Transportation Logistics and Insurance. The Transportation Logistics segment offers transportation services including truckload and less-than-truckload transportation, rail intermodal, air and ocean cargo, project cargo, and customs brokerage. The Insurance segment includes risk and claims management services. The company was founded in January 1991 and is headquartered in Jacksonville, FL.
info.description_zh: Landstar System, Inc. 從事提供運輸管理解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：運輸物流和保險部門。運輸物流部門提供運輸服務，包括整車和零擔運輸、鐵路聯運、空運和海運、專案貨物和報關服務。保險部門包括風險和索賠管理服務。該公司成立於 1991 年 1 月，總部位於佛羅裡達州傑克遜維爾。

info.description: Honeywell International, Inc. is a software industrial company, which offers industry specific solutions to aerospace and automotive products and services. It operates through the following business segments: Aerospace Technologies, Industrial Automation, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Corporate and All Other. The company was founded by Albert M. Butz in 1906 and is headquartered in Charlotte, NC.
info.description_zh: 霍尼韋爾國際公司是一家軟體工業公司，為航空航太和汽車產品及服務提供產業特定解決方案。它透過以下業務部門運作：航空航天技術、工業自動化、建築自動化、能源和永續發展解決方案以及企業和所有其他部門。該公司由 Albert M. Butz 於 1906 年創立，總部位於北卡羅來納州夏洛特。

info.description: Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. is engaged in the development and marketing of software and hardware solutions for information technology security. Its products include Quantum, CloudGuard, Harmony, and Infinity-Vision. The company was founded by Gil Shwed, Marius Nacht, and Shlomo Kramer in July 1993 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
info.description_zh: Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. 從事資訊科技安全軟體和硬體解決方案的開發和行銷。其產品包括Quantum、CloudGuard、Harmony 和Infinity-Vision。該公司由 Gil Shwed、Marius Nacht 和 Shlomo Kramer 於 1993 年 7 月創立，總部位於以色列特拉維夫。

info.description: AbCellera Biologics, Inc. engages in the development of therapeutic antibodies. It offers antibody discovery platform that searches, decodes and analyzes natural immune systems to find antibodies that can be developed to prevent and treat disease. The company was founded by Carl Lars G. Hensen, Kathleen Lisaingo, Kevin Heyries, Veronique Lecault and Daniel Da Costa on November 8, 2012 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.description_zh: AbCellera Biologics, Inc. 從事治療性抗體的開發。它提供抗體發現平台，可以搜尋、解碼和分析自然免疫系統，以尋找可開發用於預防和治療疾病的抗體。該公司由 Carl Lars G. Hensen、Kathleen Lisaingo、Kevin Heyries、Veronique Lecault 和 Daniel Da Costa 於 2012 年 11 月 8 日創立，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: World Acceptance Corp. engages in the small-loan consumer finance business. It offers short-term small instalment, medium-term larger loans, related credit insurance, ancillary products and services to individuals. The firm also offers income tax return preparation services to customers. The company also markets computer software and related services to financial services companies through its subsidiary, ParaData Financial Systems. It operates in the following segments: Small Loans, Large Loans, and Tax Advance Loans. World Acceptance was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Greenville, SC.
info.description_zh: World Acceptance Corp.從事小額貸款消費金融業務。向個人提供短期小額分期貸款、中期大額貸款、相關信用保險、配套產品和服務。該公司還為客戶提供所得稅申報表準備服務。該公司還透過其子公司 ParaData Financial Systems 向金融服務公司銷售電腦軟體和相關服務。它的業務分為以下幾個部分：小額貸款、大額貸款和預稅貸款。 World Acceptance 成立於 1962 年，總部位於南卡羅來納州格林維爾。

info.description: JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Small Core ETF seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its assets in equity securities of small cap companies. Many of the equity securities in the fund's portfolio are securities of companies in the financials, industrials and healthcare sectors. In managing the fund, the adviser employs a fundamental data science enabled investment approach that combines research, data insights, and risk management.
info.description_zh: 摩根大通基本資料科學小型核心 ETF 旨在提供長期資本增值。一般情況下，該基金將至少80%的資產投資於小型公司的股本證券。該基金投資組合中的許多股本證券是金融、工業和醫療保健行業公司的證券。在管理基金時，顧問採用了基礎數據科學支持的投資方法，結合了研究、數據洞察和風險管理。

info.description: Stryker Corp. is a medical technology company, which engages in the provision of products and services that help improve patient and healthcare outcomes. It operates under the MedSurg and Neurotechnology, and Orthopaedics and Spine segments. The MedSurg and Neurotechnology segment includes surgical equipment and navigation systems, endoscopic and communications systems, patient handling, emergency medical equipment, intensive care disposable products, clinical communication, workflow solutions, products for the treatment of acute ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke, traditional brain, and open skull based surgical procedures, orthobiologic, and biosurgery. The Orthopaedics and Spine segment focuses on implants used in hip and knee joint replacements and trauma and extremity surgeries, and cervical, thoracolumbar, and interbody systems used in spinal injury, deformity, and degenerative therapies. The company was founded by Homer H. Stryker in 1941 and is headquartered in Portage, MI.
info.description_zh: Stryker Corp. 是一家醫療技術公司，致力於提供有助於改善患者和醫療保健結果的產品和服務。它在醫療外科和神經技術以及骨科和脊椎部門下運作。醫療外科和神經技術部門包括手術設備和導航系統、內視鏡和通訊系統、病患處理、緊急醫療設備、重症監護一次性產品、臨床通訊、工作流程解決方案、用於治療急性缺血性和出血性中風的產品、傳統腦部和開放式顱骨外科手術、骨科生物學和生物外科。骨科和脊椎部門專注於髖關節和膝關節置換術以及創傷和四肢手術中使用的植入物，以及用於脊椎損傷、畸形和退化性治療的頸椎、胸腰椎和椎間系統。該公司由 Homer H. Stryker 於 1941 年創立，總部位於密西根州波蒂奇。

info.description: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II operates as a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded by Andrew Stephen Gundlach and Michel Combes on August 27, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. II 作為一家空白支票公司運營，其成立目的是與一個或多個企業實現合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司由 Andrew Stephen Gundlach 和 Michel Combes 於 2025 年 8 月 27 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: AbbVie, Inc. is a research-based biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and sale of pharmaceutical products. It focuses on treating conditions such as chronic autoimmune diseases in rheumatology, gastroenterology, and dermatology, oncology, including blood cancers, virology, hepatitis C virus (HCV) and human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), neurological disorders, such as Parkinson's, metabolic, comprising thyroid disease and complications associated with cystic fibrosis, pain associated with endometriosis, and other serious health conditions. The company was founded on October 19, 2011 and is headquartered in North Chicago, IL.
info.description_zh: 艾伯維公司是一家以研究為基礎的生物製藥公司，從事藥品的開發和銷售。它專注於治療風濕病、胃腸病和皮膚病等慢性自體免疫疾病、腫瘤學（包括血癌）、病毒學、丙型肝炎病毒（HCV）和人類免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）、神經系統疾病（如帕金森氏症）、代謝性疾病（包括甲狀腺疾病和囊性纖維化相關併發症）、子宮內膜異位症相關疼痛以及其他嚴重健康狀況。該公司成立於2011年10月19日，總部位於伊利諾州北芝加哥。

info.description: Cambria Tax Aware ETF seeks to provide a tax-efficient investment return consisting of capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed exchanged-traded fund ("ETF") that invests in U.S.-listed equity securities that have a market capitalization of greater than $5 billion. Utilizing its own quantitative model, the fund's investment sub-adviser, Cambria Investment Management, L.P. ("Cambria" or the "Sub-Adviser") selects value stocks with lower dividend distributions, which are generally taxed as ordinary income.
info.description_zh: Cambria Tax Aware ETF 旨在提供包括資本增值在內的節稅投資回報。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），投資於市值超過 50 億美元的美國上市股票證券。該基金的投資副顧問 Cambria Investment Management, L.P.（「Cambria」或「副顧問」）利用自己的量化模型，選擇股息分配較低的價值股票，這些股票通常作為普通收入徵稅。

info.description: Portfolio Building Block World Pharma And Biotech Index ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the BITA Global Pharma and Biotech Select Index. The fund uses a "passive management" approach to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the index. The index is constructed using a rules-based methodology that identifies companies in the pharmaceutical and/or biotechnology industries with publicly traded ordinary shares listed on major stock exchanges in developed markets, as classified by BITA GmbH. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the fund's net assets in component securities that make up the index. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 投資組合建構模組世界製藥和生技指數 ETF 旨在追蹤 BITA 全球製藥和生技精選指數（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金採用「被動管理」方法來追蹤該指數未計費用和開支之前的表現。該指數採用基於規則的方法構建，該方法識別在已開發市場主要證券交易所上市的公開交易普通股的製藥和/或生物技術行業的公司（按 BITA GmbH 的分類）。一般情況下，基金將至少80%的基金淨資產投資於構成指數的成分證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Anbio Biotechnology is a medical device company. It is focused on developing and manufacturing a range of in-vitro diagnostic (IVD) products. The company was founded on July 27, 2021 and is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany.
info.description_zh: 安博生物科技是一家醫療器材公司。它專注於開發和製造一系列體外診斷（IVD）產品。該公司成立於2021年7月27日，總部位於德國法蘭克福。

info.description: Weyco Group, Inc. engages in the designing, marketing, and distribution of footwear for men, women, and children. It operates through the following segments: North American Wholesale and North American Retail. The North American Wholesale segment includes selling products to department stores and specialty shops in the United States and Canada. The North American Retail segment operates online shops and company-owned stores in cities. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Glendale, WI.
info.description_zh: Weyco Group, Inc. 從事男士、女士和兒童鞋類的設計、行銷和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：北美批發和北美零售。北美批發部門包括向美國和加拿大的百貨公司和專賣店銷售產品。北美零售部門在城市經營網路商店和公司自營商店。該公司成立於 1892 年，總部位於威斯康辛州格倫代爾。

info.description: International Business Machines Corp. is an information technology company, which engages in the provision of integrated solutions that leverage information technology and knowledge of business processes. It operates through the following segments: Software, Consulting, Infrastructure, Financing, and Other. The Software segment combines hybrid cloud platform and software solutions to help clients become more data-driven, and to automate, secure, and modernize their environments. The Consulting segment focuses on integrating skills on strategy, experience, technology and operations by domain and industry. The Infrastructure segment offers solutions for hybrid cloud and is the foundation of the hybrid cloud stack. Infrastructure is optimized for infusing AI into mission-critical transactions and tightly integrated with IBM Software including Red Hat for accelerated hybrid cloud benefits. The Financing segment refers to the client and commercial financing, facilitating IBM clients' acquisition of IT systems, software, and services. The company was founded by Charles Ranlett Flint and Thomas J. Watson Sr. on June 16, 1911 and is headquartered in Armonk, NY.
info.description_zh: 國際商業機器公司是一家資訊科技公司，致力於提供利用資訊科技和業務流程知識的整合解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：軟體、諮詢、基礎設施、融資和其他。軟體部門結合了混合雲平台和軟體解決方案，幫助客戶變得更加數據驅動，並實現其環境的自動化、安全性和現代化。諮詢部門專注於按領域和行業整合策略、經驗、技術和營運方面的技能。基礎設施部門提供混合雲解決方案，是混合雲堆疊的基礎。基礎架構經過最佳化，可將 AI 融入關鍵任務交易中，並與 Red Hat 等 IBM 軟體緊密整合，以加速混合雲優勢。融資部門是指客戶和商業融資，促進 IBM 客戶購買 IT 系統、軟體和服務。該公司由 Charles Ranlett Flint 和 Thomas J. Watson Sr. 於 1911 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於紐約州阿蒙克。

info.description: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. engages in the retailing of home products. It operates through the following segments: Pottery Barn, West Elm, Williams Sonoma, Pottery Barn Kids and Teen and Other. The Other segment includes net revenues from international franchise operations, Rejuvenation and Mark and Graham. The company was founded by Charles E. Williams on September 15, 1956 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. 從事家居產品零售。該公司透過以下部門營運：Pottery Barn、West Elm、Williams Sonoma、Pottery Barn Kids and Teen and Other。其他部門包括來自國際特許經營業務、Rejuvenation 以及 Mark and Graham 的淨收入。該公司由 Charles E. Williams 於 1956 年 9 月 15 日創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Altria Group, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the manufacture and sale of cigarettes in the United States. It operates through the following segments: Smokeable Products, Oral Tobacco Products, and All Other. The Smokeable Products segment consists of cigarettes manufactured and sold by PM USA, and machine-made large cigars and pipe tobacco manufactured and sold by Middleton. The Oral Tobacco Products segment includes MST and snus products manufactured and sold by USSTC, and oral nicotine pouches manufactured and sold by Helix. The All Other segment refers to the financial results of NJOY, Helix ROW, and the IQOS System heated tobacco business. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Richmond, VA.
info.description_zh: 奧馳亞集團有限公司是一家控股公司，在美國從事捲菸的製造和銷售。它透過以下部門運作：吸煙產品、口服菸草產品和所有其他部門。可吸菸產品部門包括 PM USA 生產和銷售的捲菸以及 Middleton 生產和銷售的機制大雪茄和鬥煙。口服菸草產品部門包括 USSTC 生產和銷售的 MST 和鼻煙產品，以及 Helix 生產和銷售的口服尼古丁袋。所有其他部門是指 NJOY、Helix ROW 和 IQOS 系統加熱菸草業務的財務表現。該公司成立於 1919 年，總部位於維吉尼亞州里士滿。

info.description: DocuSign, Inc. engages in the provision of cloud-based electronic signature solutions, which helps companies and individuals securely collect information, automate data workflows, and sign anything. The firm automates manual and paper-based processes allowing users to manage all aspects of documented business transactions including identity management, authentication, digital signature, forms and data collection, collaboration, workflow automation, and storage. Its products include eSignature, CLM, Gen for Salesforce, Document Generation, Standards-Based Signatures, Notary and Web Forms. The company was founded by Thomas H. Gonser and Court Lorenzini in 2003 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: DocuSign, Inc. 致力於提供基於雲端的電子簽名解決方案，幫助公司和個人安全地收集資訊、自動化資料工作流程以及簽署任何內容。該公司實現手動和紙本流程的自動化，允許用戶管理記錄業務交易的各個方面，包括身分管理、身份驗證、數位簽章、表格和資料收集、協作、工作流程自動化和儲存。其產品包括電子簽章、CLM、Gen for Salesforce、文件產生、基於標準的簽章、Notary 和 Web 表單。該公司由 Thomas H. Gonser 和 Court Lorenzini 於 2003 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Invesco QQQ Hedged Advantage ETF seeks to provide capital appreciation. The manager seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing primarily in a portfolio of U.S. equity securities that is intended to substantially replicate the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Index and utilizing an option overlay strategy designed to partially hedge the fund's downside exposure when equity markets decline. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Invesco QQQ 對沖優勢 ETF 旨在提供資本增值。該管理人尋求透過主要投資於美國股票證券投資組合來實現其投資目標，該投資組合旨在大幅複製納斯達克 100 指數的表現，並利用旨在部分對沖股市下跌時基金下行風險的期權疊加策略。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Eurodry Ltd. engages in the provision of worldwide ocean-going transportation services. It owns and operates drybulk carriers that transport major bulks, such as iron ore, coal and grains, and minor bulks, which includes bauxite, phosphate, and fertilizers. The company was founded on January 8, 2018 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
info.description_zh: Eurodry Ltd. 從事提供全球遠洋運輸服務。該公司擁有並經營乾散貨船，運輸鐵礦石、煤炭和穀物等大宗散貨，以及鋁土礦、磷酸鹽和化肥等小宗散裝貨物。該公司成立於2018年1月8日，總部位於希臘雅典。

info.description: Tailwind 2.0 Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. The company was founded on May 29, 2025 and is headquartered in Greenwich, CT.
info.description_zh: Tailwind 2.0 Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司。該公司成立於2025年5月29日，總部位於康乃狄克州格林威治。

info.description: Ohio Valley Banc Corp. is a financial holding company, which engages in the provision of community banking services. It operates through the Banking and Consumer Finance segments. The firm also offers non-banking activities, such as securities underwriting and dealing activities, insurance agency and underwriting activities, and merchant banking and equity investment activities. The company was founded on January 8, 1992 and is headquartered in Gallipolis, OH.
info.description_zh: Ohio Valley Banc Corp. 是一家金融控股公司，從事提供社區銀行服務。它透過銀行和消費金融部門運作。該公司還提供非銀行業務，例如證券承銷和交易活動、保險代理和承銷活動以及商業銀行和股權投資活動。該公司成立於1992年1月8日，總部位於俄亥俄州加利波利斯。

info.description: F/m Compoundr High Yield Bond ETF seeks investment results, that correspond (before fees and expenses) generally to the Nasdaq Compoundr High-Yield Corporate Bond Index. The index is designed to offer exposure consistent with the total return of high-yield corporate bonds, without receiving and reinvesting dividend income, by investing in ETFs. Under normal market conditions, F/m Investments LLC (the "Adviser") seeks to achieve the fund's objective by investing at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in underlying funds that invest primarily in high-yield bonds.
info.description_zh: F/mcompoundr 高收益債券 ETF 尋求的投資結果通常與納斯達克compoundr高收益公司債指數相對應（未扣除費用和開支）。該指數旨在透過投資 ETF 提供與高收益公司債總回報一致的風險敞口，而無需接收股息收入並進行再投資。在正常市場條件下，F/m Investments LLC（「顧問」）尋求透過將至少 80% 的基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於主要投資於高收益債券的基礎基金來實現基金的目標。

info.description: Deckers Outdoor Corp. engages in the business of designing, marketing, and distributing footwear, apparel, and accessories developed for both everyday casual lifestyle use and high performance activities. It operates through the following segments: UGG Brand, HOKA Brand, Teva Brand, Sanuk Brand, Other Brands, and Direct-to-Consumer. The UGG Brand segment offers a line of premium footwear, apparel, and accessories. The HOKA Brand segment sells footwear and apparel that offers enhanced cushioning and inherent stability with minimal weight, originally designed for ultra-runners. The Teva Brand segment focuses on the sport sandal and modern outdoor lifestyle category, such as sandals, shoes, and boots. The Sanuk Brand segment originated in Southern California surf culture and has emerged into a lifestyle brand with a presence in the relaxed casual shoe and sandal categories. The Other Brands segment includes the Koolaburra by UGG brand. The Direct-to-Consumer segment consists of retail stores and e-commerce websites. The company was founded by Douglas B. Otto in 1973 and is headquartered in Goleta, CA.
info.description_zh: Deckers Outdoor Corp. 從事設計、行銷和分銷專為日常休閒生活方式和高性能活動而開發的鞋類、服裝和配件的業務。它透過以下部門運作：UGG 品牌、HOKA 品牌、Teva 品牌、Sanuk 品牌、其他品牌和直接面向消費者。 UGG 品牌部門提供一系列優質鞋類、服裝和配件。 HOKA 品牌部門銷售最初為超級跑者設計的鞋類和服裝，這些鞋類和服裝可提供增強的緩衝性和內在穩定性，同時重量極輕。 Teva 品牌部門專注於運動涼鞋和現代戶外生活方式類別，例如涼鞋、鞋子和靴子。 Sanuk 品牌細分市場起源於南加州衝浪文化，現已發展成為一個生活方式品牌，涉足休閒休閒鞋和涼鞋類別。其他品牌部分包括 UGG 品牌的 Koolaburra。直接面向消費者的部分包括零售商店和電子商務網站。該公司由 Douglas B. Otto 於 1973 年創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州戈利塔。

info.description: Johnson & Johnson is a holding company, which engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of products in the healthcare field. It operates through the Innovative Medicine and MedTech segments. The Innovative Medicine segment focuses on immunology, infectious diseases, neuroscience, oncology, cardiovascular and metabolism, and pulmonary hypertension. The MedTech segment includes a portfolio of products used in interventional solutions, orthopaedics, surgery, and vision categories. The company was founded by Robert Wood Johnson I, James Wood Johnson, and Edward Mead Johnson Sr. in 1887 and is headquartered in New Brunswick, NJ.
info.description_zh: 強生公司是一家控股公司，從事醫療保健領域產品的研究、開發、製造和銷售。它透過創新醫學和醫療技術部門運作。創新醫學部門專注於免疫學、傳染病、神經科學、腫瘤學、心血管和代謝以及肺動脈高壓。醫療技術部門包括用於介入解決方案、骨科、手術和視覺類別的產品組合。該公司由 Robert Wood Johnson I、James Wood Johnson 和 Edward Mead Johnson Sr. 於 1887 年創立，總部位於新澤西州新不倫瑞克省。

info.description: Kimco Realty Corp. is a real estate investment trust company, which engages in the ownership and operation of open-air and grocery-anchored shopping centers. It also specializes in shopping center acquisitions, development and management. The company was founded by Milton Cooper and Martin S. Kimmel in 1973 and is headquartered in Jericho, NY.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 零售
info.description_zh: Kimco Realty Corp. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事露天購物中心和雜貨店購物中心的所有權和營運。它還專門從事購物中心收購、開發和管理。該公司由 Milton Cooper 和 Martin S. Kimmel 於 1973 年創立，總部位於紐約州傑里科。

info.description: abrdn Focused U.S. Small Cap Active ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of the value of its net assets, plus any borrowings for investment purposes, in equity securities issued by U.S. small-cap companies. The fund will be managed pursuant to a "focused" strategy whereby the fund's investment adviser will typically invest the fund's assets in a small number of issuers. Generally, the Advisor expects to hold approximately 35 to 45 issuers.
info.description_zh: abrdn 專注於美國小型股主動 ETF 尋求長期資本增值。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產價值以及任何用於投資目的的借款投資於美國小型公司發行的股本證券。該基金將根據「集中」策略進行管理，基金的投資顧問通常將基金的資產投資於少數發行人。一般來說，顧問預計將持有約 35 至 45 家發行人。

info.description: abrdn International Small Cap Active ETF seeks long-term growth of capital. The fund seeks to achieve its objective by investing primarily in equity securities of small non-U.S. companies. Equity securities include, but are not limited to, common stock, preferred stock and depositary receipts. As a non-fundamental policy, under normal market conditions, it will invest at least 80% of the value of its net assets, plus any borrowings for investment purposes, in equity securities of non-U.S. small companies.
info.description_zh: abrdn International Small Cap Active ETF 尋求資本的長期成長。該基金尋求透過主要投資於小型非美國公司的股本證券來實現其目標。股本證券包括但不限於普通股、優先股及存託憑證。作為一項非基本面政策，在正常市場條件下，它將把至少80%的淨資產價值，加上任何用於投資目的的借款，投資於非美國小公司的股本證券。

info.description: Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. is a bank holding company. It engages in the provision of banking services to commercial and retail customers. The firm operates through the following segments: Commercial and Industrial, Construction and Land Development, Commercial Real Estate, Residential Real Estate, and Consumer Installment. The Commercial and Industrial segment includes loans to finance business operations, equipment purchases, or other needs for small and medium-sized commercial customers. The Construction and Land Development segment is comprised of both loans and credit lines for the purpose of purchasing, carrying and developing land into commercial developments or residential subdivisions. The Commercial and Industrial segment provides loans disaggregated into three classes: owner occupied, multi-family and other. The Residential Real Estate segment is involved in consumer mortgage and investment property. The Consumer Installment segment encompasses loans to individuals both secured by personal property and unsecured. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Auburn, AL.
info.description_zh: Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. 是一家銀行控股公司。它從事向商業和零售客戶提供銀行服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：商業和工業、建築和土地開發、商業房地產、住宅房地產和消費者分期付款。商業和工業部門包括為業務運營、設備採購或中小型商業客戶的其他需求提供融資的貸款。建築和土地開發部門包括貸款和信貸額度，旨在購買、持有和開發土地用於商業開發或住宅小區。商業和工業部門提供的貸款分為三類：自住型、多戶型和其他型。住宅房地產部門涉及消費者抵押貸款和投資房地產。消費者分期付款部分包括向個人提供的以個人財產擔保和無擔保的貸款。該公司成立於 1990 年，總部位於阿拉巴馬州奧本。

info.description: Beta Bionics, Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company. It engages in the design, development, and commercialization of solutions for insulin-requiring people with diabetes. The company was founded by Edward R. Damiano on October 21, 2015 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Beta Bionics, Inc. 是一家商業階段的醫療器材公司。它致力於為需要胰島素的糖尿病患者設計、開發和商業化解決方案。該公司由 Edward R. Damiano 於 2015 年 10 月 21 日創立，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: Braze, Inc. operates a customer relationship management platform for mobile applications. Its application combines messaging, audience segmentation, analytics and user support in a single integrated solution. The firm offers push notifications, email, in-app messages, and news feed services. The company was founded by Mark Ghermezian, William Magnuson, and Jonathan Hyman in 2011 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Braze, Inc. 經營行動應用程式的客戶關係管理平台。其應用程式將訊息傳遞、受眾細分、分析和用戶支援結合在一個整合解決方案中。該公司提供推播通知、電子郵件、應用程式內訊息和新聞源服務。該公司由 Mark Ghermezian、William Magnuson 和 Jonathan Hyman 於 2011 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders Index (the "index"). The index uses a rules-based methodology that seeks to provide exposure to small-capitalization U.S. companies with above average free cash flow margins. Under normal circumstances, the fund will seek to invest at least 80% of its net assets, plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes, in securities of small-capitalization companies ("small cap") that are principally traded in the United States. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders ETF 旨在追蹤 Pacer US Small Cap Cash Cows Growth Leaders Index（「指數」）扣除費用和開支之前的表現。該指數採用基於規則的方法，旨在為自由現金流利潤率高於平均水平的美國小市值公司提供投資機會。在正常情況下，該基金將尋求將至少 80% 的淨資產以及用於投資目的的任何借款金額投資於主要在美國交易的小型公司（「小型股」）的證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: VictoryShares US EQ Income Enhanced Volatility Wtd ETF seeks to provide investment results that track the performance of the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap High Dividend 100 Long/Cash Volatility Weighted Index before fees and expenses. The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its assets directly or indirectly in the securities included in the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap 100 High Dividend Long/Cash Volatility Weighted Index. The index identifies the 100 highest dividend yielding stocks in the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap 500 Volatility Weighted Index.
info.description_zh: VictoryShares US EQ 收入增強波動性 Wtd ETF 旨在提供追蹤納斯達克勝利美國大盤高股息 100 多頭/現金波動性加權指數（未計費用和開支）表現的投資結果。該基金尋求透過在正常市場條件下將其至少 80% 的資產直接或間接投資於納斯達克勝利美國大型股 100 高股息多頭/現金波動率加權指數中的證券來實現其投資目標。該指數確定了納斯達克勝利美國大型股 500 波動率加權指數中 100 隻股息殖利率最高的股票。

info.description: VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF seeks to provide investment results that track the performance of the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap High Dividend 100 Volatility Weighted Index. The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing at least 80% of its assets directly or indirectly in the securities included in the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap High Dividend 100 Volatility Weighted Index. The index universe begins with the stocks included in the Nasdaq Victory US Large Cap 500 Volatility Weighted Index, a volatility weighted index comprised of the 500 largest U.S. companies by market capitalization with positive earnings over the last twelve months.
info.description_zh: VictoryShares US Large Cap High Div Volatility Wtd ETF 尋求提供追蹤納斯達克勝利美國大盤高股息 100 波動加權指數表現的投資結果。該基金尋求透過將至少 80% 的資產直接或間接投資於納斯達克勝利美國大盤高股息 100 波動加權指數中的證券來實現其投資目標。指數範圍始於納斯達克勝利美國大盤 500 波動率加權指數中包含的股票，該波動率加權指數由按市值計算在過去 12 個月內盈利的美國 500 家最大公司組成。

info.description: Calamos Convertible Opportunities and Income Fund is a closed ended fixed income mutual fund launched by Calamos Investments LLC. It is managed by Calamos Advisors LLC. The fund invests in the fixed income markets of the United States. It primarily invests in a diversified portfolio of convertible securities and high yield corporate bonds rated Ba or lower by Moody's or BB or lower by Standard & Poor's. The fund employs both fundamental and quantitative analysis with a focus on such factors as financial soundness, ability to make interest and dividend payments, earnings and cash-flow forecast, and quality of management to create its portfolio. Calamos Convertible Opportunities and Income Fund was formed on April 17, 2002 and is domiciled in the United States.
info.description_zh: Calamos Convertible Opportunities and Income Fund 是 Calamos Investments LLC 推出的封闭式固定收益共同基金。它由 Calamos Advisors LLC 管理。該基金投資於美國的固定收益市場。它主要投資於穆迪Ba級或以下評級或標準普爾評級BB級或以下的可轉換證券和高收益公司債券的多元化投資組合。該基金採用基本面分析和定量分析，重點關注財務穩健性、支付利息和股息的能力、收益和現金流量預測以及創建投資組合的管理品質等因素。 Calamos Convertible Opportunities and Income Fund 成立于 2002 年 4 月 17 日，注册地为美国。

info.description: Calamos Convertible and High Income Fund is a closed ended fixed income mutual fund launched by Calamos Investments LLC. It is managed by Calamos Advisors LLC. The fund invests in the fixed income markets of the United States. It primarily invests in a diversified portfolio of convertible securities and high yield corporate bonds rated Ba or lower by Moody's or BB or lower by Standard & Poor's. The fund employs both fundamental and quantitative analysis to create its portfolio. Calamos Convertible and High Income Fund was formed on March 12, 2003 and is domiciled in the United States.
info.description_zh: Calamos Convertible and High Income Fund 是 Calamos Investments LLC 推出的封閉式固定收益共同基金。它由 Calamos Advisors LLC 管理。該基金投資於美國的固定收益市場。它主要投資於穆迪Ba級或以下評級或標準普爾評級BB級或以下的可轉換證券和高收益公司債券的多元化投資組合。本基金採用基本面分析和定量分析來創建其投資組合。 Calamos Convertible and High Income Fund 成立於 2003 年 3 月 12 日，註冊地為美國。

info.description: Chemomab Therapeutics Ltd. is a clinical-stage biotech company, which engages in the provision of therapeutics for conditions with unmet need that involve Inflammation and fibrosis. The company was founded by Adi Mor on September 22, 2011 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
info.description_zh: Chemomab Therapeutics Ltd. 是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，致力於為發炎和纖維化等未滿足需求的疾病提供治療藥物。該公司由Adi Mor於2011年9月22日創立，總部位於以色列特拉維夫。

info.description: Comtech Telecommunications Corp. engages in the provision of emergency systems and wireless and satellite communications. It operates through Satellite and Space Communications and Allerium segments. The Satellite and Space Communication segment offers satellite ground station technologies, services and system integration that facilitate the transmission of voice, video, and data over GEO, MEO, and LEO satellite constellations, including solid-state and traveling wave tube power amplifiers, modems, VSAT platforms and frequency converters. The Allerium segment provides emergency call routing, location validation, network, policy-based routing rules, logging and security functionality to states and local governments. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Chandler, AZ.
info.description_zh: Comtech Te communications Corp. 從事提供緊急系統以及無線和衛星通訊業務。它透過衛星和太空通訊以及 Allerium 部門運作。衛星和太空通訊部門提供衛星地面站技術、服務和系統集成，促進在GEO、MEO和LEO衛星星座上傳輸語音、視訊和數據，包括固態和行波管功率放大器、調製解調器、VSAT平台和變頻器。 Allerium 部門向州和地方政府提供緊急呼叫路由、位置驗證、網路、基於策略的路由規則、日誌記錄和安全功能。該公司成立於 1967 年，總部位於亞利桑那州錢德勒。

info.description: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd. engages in the development of connectivity solutions and products for the data infrastructure market. Its products include integrated circuits, active electrical cables, and SerDes chiplets. The company was founded by Chi Fung Cheng and Yat Tung Lam on 2008 and is headquartered in George Town, Cayman Islands.
info.description_zh: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd. 致力於為資料基礎設施市場開發連接解決方案和產品。其產品包括積體電路、主動電纜和 SerDes 小晶片。該公司由 Chi Fung Cheng 和 Yat Tung Lam 於 2008 年創立，總部位於開曼群島喬治城。

info.description: Duluth Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of a lifestyle brand of men and women casual wear, work wear, and accessories. Its products assortment includes shirts, pants, underwear, outerwear, footwear, accessories, and hard goods. It features proprietary designs and distinct names, such as Longtail T-shirts, Buck NakedTM underwear, Fire Hose work pants, and No-YankTank. The company was founded by Stephen L. Schlecht in 1986 and is headquartered in Mount Horeb, WI.

Draganfly, Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of commercial unmanned aerial vehicle systems and software serving the public safety, agriculture, industrial inspections, security, mapping, and surveying markets. Its products include quad-copters, fixed wing aircrafts, ground based robots, hand held controllers, and software used for tracking, live streaming, and data collection. The firm also offers custom engineering, training, simulation consulting, as well as data and flight training services. The company was founded by Zenon Dragan and Christine Dragan in 1998 and is headquartered in Saskatoon, Canada.
info.description_zh: Draganfly, Inc. 從事商用無人機系統和軟體的製造和銷售，服務於公共安全、農業、工業檢查、安全、測繪和測量市場。其產品包括四軸飛行器、固定翼飛機、地面機器人、手持控制器以及用於追蹤、直播和數據收集的軟體。該公司還提供客製化工程、培訓、模擬諮詢以及數據和飛行培訓服務。該公司由 Zenon Dragan 和 Christine Dragan 於 1998 年創立，總部位於加拿大薩斯卡通。

info.description: Leonardo DRS, Inc. engages in the provision of defense products and technologies. It develops and manufactures defense products for the U.S. military, intelligence agencies and allies around the world. Its broad technology portfolio focuses on advanced sensing, network computing, force protection, and electrical power and propulsion, as well as a range of key defense priorities. The company operates through the Advanced Sensors and Computing and Integrated Mission Systems segments. The Advanced Sensors and Computing segment have been aligned to push towards a more autonomous future. It consists of six business units, which include Airborne & Intelligence Systems, Daylight Solutions, DRS RADA Technologies, Electro-Optical & Infrared Systems, Land Electronics, and Naval Electronics. The Integrated Mission Systems segment consists of both a ground vehicle integrator and naval power and propulsion system provider. The company was founded by Leonard Newman and David E. Gross in 1969 and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.description_zh: Leonardo DRS, Inc. 從事提供國防產品和技術。它為美國軍隊、情報機構和世界各地的盟友開發和製造國防產品。其廣泛的技術組合著重於先進感測、網路運算、部隊保護、電力和推進，以及一系列關鍵的國防優先事項。該公司透過先進感測器和計算以及整合任務系統部門進行營運。先進感測器和運算領域已經聯合起來，共同推動更自主的未來。它由六個業務部門組成，包括機載和情報系統、日光解決方案、DRS RADA 技術、光電和紅外線系統、陸地電子和海軍電子。綜合任務系統部門由地面車輛整合商和海軍動力和推進系統提供者組成。該公司由 Leonard Newman 和 David E. Gross 於 1969 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: ishares Breakthrough Environmental Solutions ETF seeks to track the investment results of the Morningstar Global Emerging Green Technologies Select Index. The underlying index measures the performance of equity securities issued by U.S. and non-U.S. companies involved in breakthrough innovations and new technologies that seek to address or combat climate change, as determined by Morningstar or its affiliates. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: isshares Breakthrough Environmental Solutions ETF 旨在追蹤晨星全球新興綠色技術精選指數的投資結果。該指數衡量由晨星或其附屬公司確定的涉及尋求解決或應對氣候變遷的突破性創新和新技術的美國和非美國公司發行的股本證券的表現。該基金通常將至少 90% 的資產投資於相關指數的成分證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: First Trust Multi Cap Value AlphaDEX Fund seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq AlphaDEX Multi Cap Value Index. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the common stocks that comprise the index. The index is designed to select value stocks from the NASDAQ US 500 Large Cap Index TM, NASDAQ US 600 Mid Cap Index TM and NASDAQ US 700 Small Cap Index TM that may generate positive alpha, or risk-adjusted returns, relative to traditional indices through the use of the AlphaDEX selection methodology.
info.description_zh: First Trust Multi Cap Value AlphaDEX 基金尋求與納斯達克 AlphaDEX Multi Cap Value Index 的價格和收益率（未計基金費用和開支）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股。該指數旨在透過使用 AlphaDEX 選擇方法，從納斯達克美國 500 大型股指數 TM、納斯達克美國 600 中型股指數 TM 和納斯達克美國 700 小型股指數 TM 中選擇價值股票，這些股票相對於傳統指數可能產生正阿爾法或風險調整回報。

info.description: Femasys, Inc. is a biomedical company, which engages in the development of novel solutions for reproductive healthcare. The company was founded by Kathy Lee-Sepsick in 2004 and is headquartered in Suwanee, GA.
info.description_zh: Femasys, Inc. 是一家生物醫學公司，致力於開發生殖保健的新型解決方案。該公司由 Kathy Lee-Sepsick 於 2004 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州蘇萬尼。

info.description: First Trust Capital Strength ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of an equity index called the Capital Strength TM Index. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the securities that comprise the index. The index seeks to provide exposure to well-capitalized companies with strong market positions that have the potential to provide their stockholders with a greater degree of stability and performance over time.
info.description_zh: First Trust Capital Strength ETF 尋求與稱為 Capital Strength TM 指數的股票指數的價格和收益率（在基金費用和開支之前）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的證券。該指數旨在為資本充足、市場地位穩固的公司提供投資機會，這些公司有可能隨著時間的推移為其股東提供更大程度的穩定性和績效。

info.description: Fast Track Group is an investment holding company, which engages in the provision of entertainment-focused event management and marketing services. It operates through the Live Entertainment and Agency segments. The Live Entertainment segment focuses on the organization and management of concerts and events. The Agency segment is involved in the promotion of events for celebrities in Asia and Hollywood, as well as facilitation of partnerships between brands and artistes. The company was founded by Sin Foo Lim on March 8, 2012 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: Fast Track Group是一家投資控股公司，提供以娛樂為中心的活動管理和行銷服務。它透過現場娛樂和代理部門運作。現場娛樂部門專注於音樂會和活動的組織和管理。代理商部門參與亞洲和好萊塢名人活動的推廣，以及促進品牌和藝人之間的合作關係。該公司由Sin Foo Lim於2012年3月8日創立，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Global X Thematic Growth ETF seeks to provide investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the Solactive Thematic Growth Index. The fund invests at least 80% of its total assets in the securities of the underlying index. The underlying index seeks to provide broad exposure to thematic growth strategies using a portfolio of exchange-traded funds (each, an "underlying ETF"). It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Global X 主題成長 ETF 力求提供與 Solactive 主題成長指數的價格和收益率表現（未計費用和開支）大致相符的投資結果。該基金將其總資產的至少 80% 投資於相關指數的證券。基礎指數旨在利用交易所交易基金（每隻「基礎 ETF」）投資組合提供對主題成長策略的廣泛投資。它是非多元化的。

info.description: iShares iBonds Dec 2055 Term Treasury ETF seeks to track the investment results of the Bloomberg December 2055 Maturity Corporate Index. The index seeks to track the investment results of an index composed of U.S. dollar-denominated, investment-grade corporate bonds maturing in 2055. The fund will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component instruments of the underlying index, and the fund will invest at least 90% of its assets in fixed income securities of the types included in the underlying index that BFA believes will help the fund track the underlying index. The fund is non-diversified. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: iShares iBonds Dec 2055 定期公債 ETF 旨在追蹤彭博 2055 年 12 月到期企業指數的投資結果。該指數旨在追蹤由將於 2055 年到期的以美元計價的投資等級公司債組成的指數的投資結果。該基金將至少 80% 的資產投資於基礎指數的組成工具，而該基金將至少 90% 的資產投資於基礎指數中包含的固定收益證券類型，BFA 認為這些證券將有助於基金追蹤基礎指數。該基金是非多元化的。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: iShares iBonds Dec 2056 Term Treasury ETF seeks to track the investment results of the ICE 2056 Maturity U.S. Treasury Index composed of U.S. Treasury bonds maturing in 2056. The fund seeks to meet its investment objective generally by investing in individual securities which satisfy the criteria of the underlying index. The underlying index consists of publicly-issued U.S. Treasury securities that are scheduled to mature between January 1, 2056 and December 15, 2056, inclusive. The fund will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index.
info.description_zh: iShares iBonds Dec 2056 Term Treasury ETF 旨在追蹤由 2056 年到期的美國國債組成的 ICE 2056 Maturity U.S. Treasury Index 的投資結果。該基金通常尋求透過投資滿足基礎指數標準的個別證券來實現其投資目標。標的指數由公開發行的美國國債組成，計劃於 2056 年 1 月 1 日至 2056 年 12 月 15 日（含）之間到期。該基金將至少 80% 的資產投資於相關指數的成分證券。

info.description: LaFayette Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of identifying, evaluating and similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 7, 2024 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
info.description_zh: LaFayette Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立是為了識別、評估一個或多個企業以及進行類似的企業合併。該公司成立於2024年6月7日，總部位於法國巴黎。

info.description: LightPath Technologies, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and distribution of optical and infrared components. Its products include molded glass and assemblies, infrared molded lenses, diamond turned, conventional ground and polished ground lenses and assemblies, and collimator assemblies, which are used in applications involving light detection and ranging technology. The firm supports a range of customers in the field of industrial, laser, defense, medical, telecommunications, and instrumentation. The company was founded in1985 and is headquartered in Orlando, FL.
info.description_zh: LightPath Technologies, Inc. 從事光學和紅外線元件的設計、開發、製造和分銷。其產品包括模製玻璃和組件、紅外線模製透鏡、鑽石車削、傳統磨削和拋光磨削透鏡和組件以及準直器組件，這些產品用於涉及光探測和測距技術的應用。該公司為工業、雷射、國防、醫療、電信和儀器儀表領域的眾多客戶提供支援。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州奧蘭多。

info.description: JPMorgan Fundamental Data Science Mid Core ETF seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its assets in equity securities of mid cap companies. Many of the equity securities in the fund's portfolio are securities of companies in the financials, industrials and consumer discretionary sectors. In managing the fund, the adviser employs a fundamental data science enabled investment approach that combines research, data insights, and risk management.
info.description_zh: 摩根大通基本資料科學中核心 ETF 尋求提供長期資本增值。一般情況下，該基金至少80%的資產投資於中型公司的股本證券。該基金投資組合中的許多股本證券是金融、工業和非必需消費品行業公司的證券。在管理基金時，顧問採用了基礎數據科學支持的投資方法，結合了研究、數據洞察和風險管理。

info.description: State Street My2031 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2031. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2031.
info.description_zh: State Street My2031 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2031 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時在接近 2031 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時尋求最大化當前收入並保留資本。

info.description: Quantum-Si, Inc. is a life sciences company focused on revolutionizing the growing field of proteomics. It engages in the development of a proprietary universal single-molecule detection platform to enable Next-Generation Protein Sequencing (NGPS), the ability to sequence proteins in a massively parallel fashion. Its platform includes platinum NGPS instrument, platinum analysis software, and consumable kits for platinum instrument. The company was founded by Jonathan M. Rothberg on June 24, 2013 and is headquartered in Branford, CT.
info.description_zh: Quantum-Si, Inc. 是一家生命科學公司，致力於徹底改變不斷發展的蛋白質體學領域。它致力於開發專有的通用單分子檢測平台，以實現下一代蛋白質測序（NGPS），即以大規模並行方式對蛋白質進行測序的能力。其平台包括鉑金NGPS儀器、鉑金分析軟體以及鉑金儀器耗材套件。該公司由 Jonathan M. Rothberg 於 2013 年 6 月 24 日創立，總部位於康乃狄克州布蘭福德。

info.description: Wisdomtree U.S. Smallcap Quality Growth Fund seeks to track the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the WisdomTree U.S. SmallCap Quality Growth Index. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in the constituent securities of the index, each of which is a security issued by a small-cap company, identified in accordance with the index provider's market-capitalization selection parameters, that is incorporated and headquartered in the United States.
info.description_zh: Wisdomtree 美國小型股品質成長基金旨在追蹤 WisdomTree 美國小型股品質成長指數（未計費用和開支）的價格和收益率表現。一般情況下，該基金將至少80%的淨資產投資於該指數的成分證券，每隻成分證券都是由一家小盤公司發行的證券，該公司是根據指數提供商的市值選擇參數確定的，該公司在美國註冊成立並總部位於美國。

info.description: Defiance Retail Kings ETF is an actively managed fund that targets long-term capital appreciation by investing in U.S.-listed companies demonstrating high retail investor sentiment and digital engagement. The fund utilizes a proprietary model to identify "Retail Kings"-companies that are favorites or trending leaders in online investor communities-while further vetting them for fundamental resilience and competitive moats.
info.description_zh: Defiance Retail Kings ETF 是一檔主動式管理基金，透過投資表現出高散戶投資者情緒和數位參與度的美國上市公司來實現長期資本增值。該基金利用專有模型來識別「零售之王」——線上投資者社群中最受歡迎或趨勢領先的公司——同時進一步審查它們的基本彈性和競爭護城河。

info.description: Rambus, Inc. engages in the provision of cutting-edge semiconductor and Internet Protocol products, spanning memory and interfaces to security, smart sensors and lighting. Its products include Memory Interface Chips, Interface IP, and Security IP. The company was founded by P. Michael Farmwald and Mark A. Horowitz in March 1990 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.
info.description_zh: Rambus, Inc. 致力於提供尖端半導體和網際網路協定產品，涵蓋記憶體和安全介面、智慧感測器和照明。其產品包括記憶體介面晶片、介面IP和安全IP。該公司由 P. Michael Farmwald 和 Mark A. Horowitz 於 1990 年 3 月創立，總部位於加州桑尼維爾。

info.description: Ryanair Holdings Plc engages in the provision of low-fare airline-related services. The firm also offers ancillary, core air passenger, non-flight scheduled, and internet-related services also involved in in-flight sale of beverages, food, and merchandise. It operates through the following segments: Ryanair DAC, Malta Air, and Other Airlines. Ryanair U.K. The company was founded on June 5, 1996 and is headquartered in Swords, Ireland.
info.description_zh: Ryanair Holdings Plc 從事提供低價航空相關服務。該公司還提供輔助、核心航空客運、非航班定期服務和網路相關服務，也涉及飲料、食品和商品的機上銷售。它透過以下部門運作：瑞安航空 DAC、馬耳他航空和其他航空公司。英國瑞安航空 該公司成立於 1996 年 6 月 5 日，總部位於愛爾蘭索茲。

info.description: Senseonics Holdings, Inc. is a medical technology company, which engages in the development and manufacture of glucose monitoring products. Its primary product is the brand Eversense CGM (continuous glucose monitoring) including sensors, smart transmitters, and mobile applications. The company was founded on June 26, 2014 and is headquartered in Germantown, MD.
info.description_zh: Senseonics Holdings, Inc.是一家醫療科技公司，從事血糖​​監測產品的開發和製造。其主要產品是 Eversense CGM（連續血糖監測）品牌，包括感測器、智慧發射器和行動應用程式。該公司成立於2014年6月26日，總部位於馬裡蘭州日耳曼敦。

info.description: Soren Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on September 2, 2025 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Soren Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年9月2日，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Royce Quant Small-Cap Quality Value ETF seeks to achieve long-term growth of capital. The fund primarily invests in equity securities of small-capitalization companies that are traded in the United States and meet certain criteria using a proprietary methodology created by the fund's subadviser. Under normal market conditions, it invests at least 80% of its net assets, plus borrowings for investment purposes, if any, in equity securities of small-capitalization companies or other instruments with similar characteristics.
info.description_zh: Royce Quant 小盘股优质价值 ETF 致力于实现资本的长期增长。該基金主要投資於在美國交易的小型公司的股本證券，並使用該基金的次級顧問創建的專有方法來滿足某些標準。在正常市場條件下，其至少80%的淨資產以及用於投資目的的借款（如有）投資於小型公司的股本證券或具有類似特徵的其他工具。

info.description: Streamex Corp. operates as a Real-World Asset (RWA) tokenization. It engages in the provision of blockchain technology to tokenize physical commodities such as gold and create related financial products. The company was founded by Kenneth L. Londoner, Karl Henry McPhie, and Morgan Lekstrom on February 24, 2009 and is headquartered in Winter Park, FL.
info.description_zh: Streamex Corp. 作為現實世界資產 (RWA) 代幣化運作。它致力於提供區塊鏈技術來對黃金等實體商品進行代幣化並創建相關的金融產品。該公司由 Kenneth L. Londoner、Karl Henry McPhie 和 Morgan Lekstrom 於 2009 年 2 月 24 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州溫特帕克。

info.description: Thornburg Focus Growth Fund is an actively managed U.S. equity strategy that targets long-term capital appreciation by investing in a concentrated yet diversified portfolio of 40-60 high-quality businesses identified through rigorous bottom-up fundamental research. The fund utilizes a unique three-basket portfolio construction to balance exposures across the growth spectrum, primarily targeting mid-to-large-capitalization U.S. companies that possess sustainable competitive advantages and trade below their estimated long-term intrinsic value.
info.description_zh: Thornburg Focus Growth Fund 是一項積極管理的美國股票策略，透過投資於透過嚴格的自下而上的基礎研究確定的 40-60 家優質企業的集中而多元化的投資組合，以實現長期資本增值。該基金利用獨特的三籃子投資組合結構來平衡整個成長範圍的風險敞口，主要針對擁有可持續競爭優勢且交易價格低於其估計長期內在價值的大中型美國公司。

info.description: Twist Bioscience Corp. engages in the development of a proprietary semiconductor-based synthetic DNA manufacturing process. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, EMEA, and APAC. The Americas segment consists of the United States of America, Canada, Mexico, and South America. The EMEA segment includes Europe, Middle East, and Africa. The APAC segment focuses on Japan, China, South Korea, India, Singapore, Malaysia, and Australia. The company was founded by William Marine Banyai, Emily Marine Leproust, and Bill James Peck in 2013 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Twist Bioscience Corp. 致力於開發基於半導體的專有合成 DNA 製造流程。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、歐洲、中東和非洲和亞太地區。美洲部分包括美國、加拿大、墨西哥和南美洲。歐洲、中東和非洲地區包括歐洲、中東和非洲。亞太地區市場主要集中在日本、中國、韓國、印度、新加坡、馬來西亞和澳洲。該公司由 William Marine Banyai、Emily Marine Leproust 和 Bill James Peck 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Thornburg International Growth ETF seeks long-term capital growth. The fund adviser expects to invest primarily in equity securities or depositary receipts of non-U.S. developed market issuers selected for their growth potential. Thornburg, the fund's investment adviser, intends to invest in companies that it believes have growth characteristics, such as growing revenues and earnings or the prospect for such growth in revenues or earnings. The fund can invest in companies of any size, from larger, well-established companies to smaller, emerging growth companies. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Thornburg International Growth ETF 尋求長期資本成長。該基金顧問預計將主要投資於根據成長潛力而選擇的非美國已開發市場發行人的股本證券或存託憑證。該基金的投資顧問桑伯格打算投資於它認為具有成長特徵的公司，例如收入和收益不斷增長或收入或收益有成長前景的公司。該基金可以投資任何規模的公司，從大型、成熟的公司到小型、新興的成長型公司。它是非多元化的。

info.description: VS MEDIA Holdings Ltd. engages in the management of a global network of digital creators who create and publish content to social media platforms. It operates through the following segments: Marketing Services, Social Commerce, and Other. The Marketing Services segment is involved in providing affiliate marketing, product placement, and brand sponsorship deals for creators to promote brand's messages; and creating and publishing content on social media platforms. The Social Commerce segment resells brand's products to creators. The company was founded by Nga Fan Wong in 2013 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: VS MEDIA Holdings Ltd. 從事全球數位創作者網路的管理，這些創作者在社群媒體平台上創建和發佈內容。它透過以下部門運作：行銷服務、社交商務和其他。行銷服務部門為創作者提供聯盟行銷、產品置入和品牌贊助交易，以宣傳品牌訊息；在社群媒體平台上創建和發佈內容。社群商務部門將品牌產品轉售給創作者。該公司由黃雅帆於2013年創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: Western Asset Bond ETF seeks to maximize total return consistent with prudent investment management and liquidity needs. The fund invests in a portfolio comprised of debt instruments and fixed income securities of various maturities. The fund may also invest in credit-linked securities.
info.description_zh: 西部資產債券ETF尋求在符合審慎投資管理和流動性需求的情況下實現總回報最大化。該基金投資於由債務工具和不同期限的固定收益證券所組成的投資組合。該基金也可以投資於信用掛鉤證券。

info.description: Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares seeks to track the performance of S&P Global Ex-U.S. Dividend Growers Index that measures the investment return of non-U.S. companies that have a history of increasing dividends. The index focuses on high-quality companies located in developed and emerging markets, excluding the U.S., that have both the ability and the commitment to grow their dividends over time. The manager attempts to replicate the target index by investing all, or substantially all, of its assets in the collection of securities that make up the index, holding each stock in approximately the same proportion as its weighting in the index.
info.description_zh: Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares 旨在追蹤 S&P Global Ex-U.S. 的表現股息成長指數衡量具有增加股息歷史的非美國公司的投資回報。該指數重點關注已開發市場和新興市場（美國除外）的優質公司，這些公司有能力也有承諾隨著時間的推移增加股息。經理人試圖透過將其全部或幾乎全部資產投資於構成指數的證券集合來複製目標指數，並以與其在指數中的權重大致相同的比例持有每隻股票。

info.description: Starry Sea Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on December 5, 2024 and is headquartered in Albany, NY.
info.description_zh: Starry Sea Acquisition Corp.是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2024年12月5日，總部位於紐約州奧爾巴尼。

info.description: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on July 21, 2025 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp.是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於 2025 年 7 月 21 日，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Invesco International Dividend Achievers ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the NASDAQ International Dividend AchieversTM Index. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is composed of Global Depositary Receipts ("GDRs") that are listed on the London Stock Exchange ("LSE") or the London International Exchange, American Depositary Receipts ("ADRs"), non-U.S. common or ordinary stocks, limited partnership interests and shares of limited liability companies that are listed on the NYSE.
info.description_zh: Invesco International Dividend Achievers ETF 旨在追蹤 NASDAQ International Dividend AchieversTM 指數的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。標的指數由在倫敦證券交易所（「LSE」）或倫敦國際交易所上市的全球存託憑證（「GDR」）、美國存託憑證（「ADR」）、非美國普通股或普通股、有限合夥權益以及在紐約證券交易所上市的有限責任公司股份組成。

info.description: Intelligent Real Estate ETF seeks total return. The fund is an actively-managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that will invest in a diversified portfolio of publicly-traded real estate investment trusts ("REITs") and mortgage-backed securities ("MBS") listed primarily on U.S. stock exchanges, and to a lesser extent, stock exchanges in Canada, Europe, and Asia. The fund will invest in REITs and MBS that, in the determination of the fund's sub-adviser, have similar qualitative characteristics to the aggregate real estate portfolio holdings of a select group of public, non-traded REITs. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 智慧房地產ETF追求總回報。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），將投資於主要在美國證券交易所上市的公開交易房地產投資信託基金（「REIT」）和抵押貸款支持證券（「MBS」）的多元化投資組合，其次是在加拿大、歐洲和亞洲的證券交易所上市。該基金將投資於基金副顧問確定的房地產投資信託基金和抵押貸款支持證券，這些房地產投資信託基金和抵押貸款支持證券與選定的一組公共非交易房地產投資信託基金的總房地產投資組合持有量具有相似的品質特徵。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on September 28, 2023 and is headquartered in Danville, CA.
info.description_zh: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2023年9月28日，總部位於加州丹維爾。

info.description: Calisa Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 11, 2024 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Calisa Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2024年3月11日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: FRP Holdings, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of real estate business. It operates through the following segments: Multifamily, Industrial and Commercial, Mining Royalty Lands and Development. The Multifamily segment includes six stabilized joint ventures which own and manage apartment buildings and any associated retail. The Industrial and Commercial segment owns, leases and manages commercial properties. The Mining Royalty Lands segment owns several properties consisting of approximately 16,640 acres currently under lease for mining rents or royalties. The Development segment owns and monitors several parcels of land that are in various stages of development. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Jacksonville, FL.
info.description_zh: FRP Holdings, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事提供房地產業務。它透過以下部門運作：多戶型、工業和商業、礦業特許權土地和開發部門。多戶住宅部門包括六家穩定的合資企業，它們擁有並管理公寓大樓和任何相關零售。工業和商業部門擁有、租賃和管理商業房地產。採礦權土地部門擁有多處物業，包括約 16,640 英畝的土地，目前正以採礦租金或特許權使用費出租。開發部門擁有並管理幾塊處於不同開發階段的土地。該公司成立於 1986 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州傑克遜維爾。

info.description: SiriusXM Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of audio entertainment. It operates through the Sirius XM and Pandora and Off-Platform segments. The Sirius XM segment features a wide range of content, including, music, sports, entertainment, comedy, talk and news channels, podcasts and infotainment services, all available in the United States on a subscription fee basis. The Pandora and Off-Platform segment generates a majority of its revenues from third parties advertising on the Pandora ad-supported service and other platforms. The company was founded on May 17, 1990, and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: SiriusXM Holdings, Inc. 從事提供音訊娛樂事業。它透過 Sirius XM 和 Pandora 以及平台外部分運作。 Sirius XM 部分提供廣泛的內容，包括音樂、體育、娛樂、喜劇、談話和新聞頻道、播客和資訊娛樂服務，所有內容均在美國以訂閱費形式提供。潘朵拉和平台外部門的大部分收入來自潘朵拉廣告支援服務和其他平台上的第三方廣告。該公司成立於1990年5月17日，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Berkshire Hathaway, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of property and casualty insurance and reinsurance, utilities and energy, freight rail transportation, finance, manufacturing, and retailing services. It operates through the following segments: Insurance, Burlington Northern Santa Fe, LLC (BNSF), Berkshire Hathaway Energy (BHE), Pilot Travel Centers (PTC), Manufacturing, McLane, and Service and Retailing. The Insurance segment includes the underwriting of GEICO, Berkshire Hathaway Primary Group, and Berkshire Hathaway Reinsurance Group. The BNSF segment involves the operation of railroad systems. The BHE segment focuses on regulated electric and gas utility, power generation and distribution, and real estate brokerage activities. The PTC segment consists of managing travel centers and marketing of wholesale fuel. The Manufacturing segment refers to industrial, consumer and building products, home building, and related financial services. The McLane segment covers the wholesale distribution of groceries and non-food items. The Service and Retailing segment relates to the provision of shared aircraft ownership programs, aviation pilot training, electronic components distribution, retailing businesses, automobile dealerships and trailer, and furniture leasing services. The company was founded by Oliver Chace in 1839 and is headquartered in Omaha, NE.
info.description_zh: 波克夏海瑟威公司是一家控股公司，從事提供財產和傷亡保險及再保險、公用事業和能源、鐵路貨運、金融、製造和零售服務。該公司透過以下部門營運：保險部門、Burlington Northern Santa Fe, LLC (BNSF)、伯克希爾哈撒韋能源部門 (BHE)、Pilot Travel Centers (PTC)、製造部門、McLane 部門以及服務和零售部門。保險部門包括 GEICO、Berkshire Hathaway Primary Group 和 Berkshire Hathaway Reinsurance Group 的承保業務。 BNSF 部門涉及鐵路系統的運作。 BHE 部門專注於受監管的電力和燃氣公用事業、發電和配電以及房地產經紀活動。 PTC 部門包括管理旅遊中心和批發燃料行銷。製造業涉及工業、消費品和建築產品、住宅建築以及相關金融服務。 McLane 部門涵蓋雜貨和非食品的批發分銷。服務和零售部門涉及提供共享飛機所有權計劃、航空飛行員培訓、電子元件分銷、零售業務、汽車經銷商和拖車以及家具租賃服務。該公司由 Oliver Chace 於 1839 年創立，總部位於內布拉斯加州奧馬哈。

info.description: The TJX Cos., Inc. engages in the retail of apparel and home fashion products. It operates through the following business segments: Marmaxx, HomeGoods, TJX Canada, and TJX International. The Marmaxx segment sells family apparel including apparel, home fashions, and other merchandise. The HomeGoods segment offers an assortment of home fashions, including furniture, rugs, lighting, soft home, decorative accessories, tabletop and cookware as well as expanded pet, kids, and gourmet food departments. The TJX Canada segment operates the Winners, Marshalls, and HomeSense chains in Canada. The TJX International segment includes operations of T.K. Maxx and Homesense chains in Europe and the T.K. Maxx chain in Australia. The company was founded by Bernard Cammarata in 1962 and is headquartered in Framingham, MA.
info.description_zh: TJX Cos., Inc. 從事服裝和家居時尚產品的零售。該公司透過以下業務部門營運：Marmaxx、HomeGoods、TJX Canada 和 TJX International。 Marmaxx 部門銷售家庭服裝，包括服裝、家居時裝和其他商品。家居用品部門提供各種家居時尚產品，包括家具、地毯、照明、軟家居、裝飾配件、桌面和炊具以及擴展的寵物、兒童和美食部門。 TJX 加拿大部門在加拿大經營 Winners、Marshalls 和 HomeSense 連鎖店。 TJX International 部門包括 T.K.歐洲的 Maxx 和 Homesense 連鎖店以及 T.K.澳洲 Maxx 連鎖店。該公司由 Bernard Cammarata 於 1962 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州弗雷明漢。

info.description: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of BRK/B. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of BRK/B and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to BRK/B, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily BRKB Bull 2X Shares 尋求每日投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 BRK/B 每日表現的 200%。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於 BRK/B 證券以及掉期協議和期權等金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來為 BRK/B 提供 2 倍的每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. engages in the provision of solid waste management services. It operates through the following segments: Eastern, Western, Mid-Atlantic, and Resource Solutions. The Eastern segment involves the operation of landfills located in Bethlehem, New Hampshire, and West Old Town, Maine. The Western region segment includes the management of landfills in Vermont and New York. The Mid-Atlantic consists of collection facilities and transfer station facility. The Resource Solutions segment focuses on the provision of materials processing, industrial recycling, organics, and resource management service. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Rutland, VT.
info.description_zh: Casella Waste Systems, Inc. 從事提供固體廢棄物管理服務。它透過以下部門運作：東部、西部、大西洋中部和資源解決方案部門。東段涉及位於新罕布夏州伯利恆和緬因州西老城區的垃圾掩埋場的運作。西部地區部門包括佛蒙特州和紐約州垃圾掩埋場的管理。大西洋中部由收集設施和中轉站設施組成。資源解決方案部門專注於提供材料加工、工業回收、有機物和資源管理服務。該公司成立於 1975 年，總部位於佛蒙特州拉特蘭。

info.description: EOG Resources, Inc. engages in the exploration, development, production and marketing of crude oil and natural gas. It operates through the United States, Trinidad, and Other International geographical segments. The Other International segment includes China and Canada operations. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: EOG Resources, Inc.從事原油和天然氣的勘探、開發、生產和行銷。它透過美國、特立尼達和其他國際地理部門開展業務。其他國際部門包括中國和加拿大業務。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: ServiceNow, Inc. engages in the provision of an end-to-end workflow automation platform for digital businesses. Its Now Platform is a cloud-based solution embedded with artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML). The company was founded by Frederic B. Luddy in June 2004 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
info.description_zh: ServiceNow, Inc. 致力於為數位企業提供端到端工作流程自動化平台。其 Now 平台是一個基於雲端的解決方案，嵌入了人工智慧 (AI) 和機器學習 (ML)。該公司由 Frederic B. Luddy 於 2004 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖克拉拉。

info.description: Fulgent Genetics, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the provision of gene testing and sequencing solutions. It offers genes and panels, known mutation, hereditary cancer, carrier screening, and tumor profiling solutions. The company was founded by Ming Hsieh on May 13, 2016 and is headquartered in El Monte, CA.
info.description_zh: Fulgent Genetics, Inc.是一家提供基因測試和定序解決方案的科技公司。它提供基因和麵板、已知突變、遺傳性癌症、攜帶者篩檢和腫瘤分析解決方案。該公司由Ming Hsieh於2016年5月13日創立，總部位於加州埃爾蒙特。

info.description: Exxon Mobil Corp. engages in the exploration, development, and distribution of oil, gas, and petroleum products. It operates through the following segments: Upstream, Energy Products, Chemical Products, and Specialty Products. The Upstream segment organizes the exploration of crude oil and natural gas. The Energy Products segment includes fuels, aromatics, and catalyst and licensing. The Chemical Products segment offers petrochemicals. The Specialty Products segment provides finished lubricants, basestocks and waxes, synthetics, and elastomers and resins. The company was founded by John D. Rockefeller in 1882 and is headquartered in Spring, TX.
info.description_zh: 埃克森美孚公司從事石油、天然氣和石油產品的勘探、開發和分銷。它透過以下部門運作：上游部門、能源產品部門、化學產品部門和特殊產品部門。上游部門組織原油和天然氣的勘探。能源產品部門包括燃料、芳烴、催化劑和許可。化學產品部門提供石化產品。特種產品部門提供成品潤滑劑、基礎油和蠟、合成材料、彈性體和樹脂。該公司由約翰·D·洛克菲勒 (John D. Rockefeller) 於 1882 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州斯普林。

info.description: Portfolio Building Block Integrated Oil And Gas And Exploration And Production Index ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the BITA Global Oil & Gas Select Index. The fund uses a "passive management" approach to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the index. The index is constructed using a rules-based methodology that identifies companies in the upstream segment of the oil and gas industry value chain with publicly traded ordinary shares listed on major stock exchanges in developed markets, as classified by BITA GmbH. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of the fund's net assets in component securities that make up the index. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 投資組合建構模組綜合石油和天然氣及勘探和生產指數 ETF 旨在追蹤 BITA 全球石油和天然氣精選指數（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金採用「被動管理」方法來追蹤該指數未計費用和開支之前的表現。該指數採用基於規則的方法構建，該方法識別石油和天然氣行業價值鏈上游部分、在已開發市場主要證券交易所上市的公開交易普通股的公司（按 BITA GmbH 的分類）。一般情況下，基金將至少80%的基金淨資產投資於構成指數的成分證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of optics and photonics enabled products. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Rochester, NY.
info.description_zh: Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. 從事光學和光子產品的設計和製造。該公司成立於 1981 年，總部位於紐約州羅徹斯特。

info.description: CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the business of innate immune cell-based immunotherapy, pluripotent stem cell-based therapy, and undertaking the research and development of immune cell and stem cell-based therapy. It operates through the Malaysia and Singapore geographical segments. The company was founded by Chee Kong Choo on March 9, 2018 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd.是一家生物製藥公司，從事天然免疫細胞免疫療法、多能幹細胞療法業務，並承擔免疫細胞和幹細胞療法的研發。它透過馬來西亞和新加坡地理部門運作。該公司由Chee Kong Choo於2018年3月9日創立，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Republic Services, Inc. engages in the provision of environmental services. It operates through the following segments: Group 1, Group 2, and Group 3. The Group 1 segment focuses on the business of recycling and solid waste in geographic areas located in western United States. The Group 2 segment includes the recycling and solid waste business in geographic areas located in the southeastern and mid-western and the eastern seaboard of the United States. The Group 3 segment includes environmental solutions business in geographic areas located across the United States and Canada. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Republic Services, Inc. 從事提供環境服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：第 1 組、第 2 組和第 3 組。第 1 組部門專注於美國西部地理區域的回收和固體廢棄物業務。第二組部門包括位於美國東南部、中西部和東海岸地理區域的回收和固體廢物業務。第三組部門包括位於美國和加拿大地理區域的環境解決方案業務。該公司成立於 1996 年，總部位於亞利桑那州鳳凰城。

info.description: Dorchester Minerals LP engages in the acquisition, ownership, and administration of royalty properties and net profits interests (NPI). The NPI represents a net profits overriding royalty interest burdening various properties owned by its operating partnership. Royalty properties consist of producing and nonproducing mineral, royalty, overriding royalty, net profits, and leasehold interests. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: Dorchester Minerals LP 從事特許權使用費和淨利潤權益 (NPI) 的收購、所有權和管理業務。 NPI 代表淨利潤高於其營運合夥企業擁有的各種財產的特許權使用費利息。特許權使用費財產包括生產性和非生產性礦物、特許權使用費、首要特許權使用費、淨利潤和租賃權益。該公司成立於 1982 年，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: Standard BioTools Inc. engages in the provision of biotechnology tools and services for clinical research. It sells preparatory and analytical instruments for mass cytometry, polymerase chain reaction, library prep, single cell genomics, and consumables including integrated fluidic circuits (IFCs), assays, and reagents. The company was founded by Stephen D. Quake and Gajus Vincent Worthington on May 19, 1999 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: Standard BioTools Inc. 致力於為臨床研究提供生物技術工具和服務。該公司銷售用於質譜流式分析、聚合酶鍊式反應、文庫製備、單細胞基因組學的製備和分析儀器，以及包括整合流體迴路 (IFC)、測定和試劑在內的消耗品。該公司由 Stephen D. Quake 和 Gajus Vincent Worthington 於 1999 年 5 月 19 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: Rain Enhancement Technologies Holdco, Inc. develops, manufactures, and commercializes ionization rainfall generation technology to provide additional rainfall for industries, supranational organizations, countries, and localities. The company is headquartered in Naples, FL.
info.description_zh: Rain Improvement Technologies Holdco, Inc. 開發、製造和商業化電離降雨產生技術，為工業、跨國組織、國家和地區提供額外的降雨。該公司總部位於佛羅裡達州那不勒斯。

info.description: Chevron Corp. engages in the provision of oil and gas energy solutions. It provides crude oil and natural gas, manufactures transportation fuels, lubricants, petrochemicals, and additives, and develops technologies that enhance business and the industry. It operates through the Upstream and Downstream segments.
