The Upstream segment consists of the exploration, development, and production of crude oil and natural gas, the liquefaction, transportation, and regasification associated with liquefied natural gas, the transporting of crude oil by major international oil export pipelines, the processing, transporting, storage, and marketing of natural gas, and a gas-to-liquids plant. The Downstream segment consists of the refining of crude oil into petroleum products, the marketing of crude oil and refined products, the transporting of crude oil and refined products by pipeline, marine vessel, motor equipment, and rail car, and the manufacturing and marketing of commodity petrochemicals and plastics for industrial uses and fuel & lubricant additives. The company was founded on September 10, 1879 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: 雪佛龍公司從事提供石油和天然氣能源解決方案。它提供原油和天然氣，生產運輸燃料、潤滑油、石化產品和添加劑，並開發增強業務和產業的技術。它透過上游和下游部分運作。上游部門包括原油和天然氣的勘探、開發和生產，與液化天然氣相關的液化、運輸和再氣化，透過主要國際石油出口管道運輸原油，天然氣的加工、運輸、儲存和行銷以及天然氣液化工廠。下游部門包括將原油精煉成石油產品，原油和成品油的營銷，透過管道、船舶、電機設備和軌道車運輸原油和成品油，以及工業用大宗石化產品和塑膠以及燃料和潤滑油添加劑的製造和行銷。該公司成立於 1879 年 9 月 10 日，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Halliburton Co. engages in the provision of products and services to the energy industry. It operates through the Completion and Production, and Drilling and Evaluation segments. The Completion and Production segment focuses on cementing, stimulation, specialty chemicals, intervention, pressure control, artificial lift, and completion products and services. The Drilling and Evaluation segment provides field and reservoir modeling, drilling, fluids, evaluation, and wellbore placement solutions that enable customers to model, measure, drill, and optimize well construction activities. The company was founded by Erle P. Halliburton in 1919 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: 哈里伯頓公司從事為能源產業提供產品和服務。它透過完井和生產以及鑽井和評估部門運作。完井和生產部門專注於固井、增產、特殊化學品、幹預、壓力控制、人工舉升以及完井產品和服務。鑽井和評估部門提供現場和油藏建模、鑽井、流體、評估和井眼佈置解決方案，使客戶能夠建模、測量、鑽井和優化建井活動。該公司由 Erle P. Halliburton 於 1919 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Occidental Petroleum Corp. engages in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas. It operates through the following segments: Oil and Gas, Chemical, and Midstream and Marketing. The Oil and Gas segment explores for, develops and produces oil and condensate, natural gas liquids, and natural gas. The Chemical segment manufactures and markets basic chemicals and vinyls. The Midstream and Marketing segment purchases, markets, gathers, processes, transports and stores oil, condensate, natural gas liquids, natural gas, carbon dioxide, and power. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: 西方石油公司從事石油和天然氣的勘探和生產。它透過以下部門運作：石油和天然氣部門、化學部門、中游部門和行銷部門。石油和天然氣部門勘探、開發和生產石油和凝析油、液化天然氣和天然氣。化學部門生產和銷售基本化學品和乙烯基。中游和行銷部門購買、行銷、收集、加工、運輸和儲存石油、凝析油、液化天然氣、天然氣、二氧化碳和電力。該公司成立於 1920 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: GraniteShares 2x Long NOW Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the common stock of ServiceNow, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund that attempts to replicate 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change the underlying stock by entering into financial instruments such as swaps and options on the underlying stock as well as directly purchasing the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 2x Long NOW Daily ETF 尋求未計費用和開支之前的每日投資結果，為 ServiceNow, Inc. 普通股每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金，試圖透過簽訂標的股票掉期和選擇權等金融工具以及直接購買標的股票來複製標的股票每日百分比變化的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. engages in the provision of freight transportation services and logistics solutions. It operates through the following segments: North American Surface Transportation (NAST), Global Forwarding, and All Other and Corporate. The NAST segment provides freight transportation services across North America through a network of offices in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. The Global Forwarding segment focuses on the global logistics services through an international network of offices in North America, Europe, Asia, Australia, New Zealand, and South America. The All Other and Corporate segment includes Robinson Fresh and Managed Services segments, as well as other surface transportation outside of North America and other miscellaneous revenues and unallocated corporate expenses. The company was founded by Charles Henry Robinson in 1905 and is headquartered in Eden Prairie, MN.
info.description_zh: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. 從事提供貨運服務和物流解決方案。該公司透過以下部門運營：北美地面運輸部門 (NAST)、全球貨運部門以及所有其他部門和企業部門。 NAST 部門透過位於美國、加拿大和墨西哥的辦事處網路提供橫跨北美的貨運服務。全球貨運部門專注於透過北美、歐洲、亞洲、澳洲、紐西蘭和南美辦事處的國際網路提供全球物流服務。所有其他和企业部门包括 Robinson Fresh 和管理服务部门，以及北美以外的其他地面运输以及其他杂项收入和未分配的公司支出。該公司由 Charles Henry Robinson 於 1905 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州伊甸草原。

info.description: D-MARKET Elektronik Hizmetler Tic. A.S. is a holding company, which engages in online shopping websites. It offers computers, mobile phones, home appliances, sports goods, clothing products, cosmetics, jewelries, books, game consoles, and furniture. The company was founded by Hanzade Dogan Boyner in 1998 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
info.description_zh: D-MARKET Elektronik Hizmetler Tic。作為。是一家控股公司，從事線上購物網站。它提供電腦、手機、家用電器、體育用品、服裝產品、化妝品、珠寶、書籍、遊戲機和家具。該公司由 Hanzade Dogan Boyner 於 1998 年創立，總部位於土耳其伊斯坦堡。

info.description: Mama's Creations, Inc. engages in the marketing, manufacturing, and distribution of fresh deli-prepared foods. The firm's products include beef meatballs, turkey meatballs, stuffed meatballs, lasagna roll ups, retail ready meals, bulk deli, single-size pasta bowls, and packaged refrigerated products. Its brands include MamaMancini's, Crown 1, Creative Salads, and The Olive Branch. The company was founded by Daniel Dougherty and Daniel Mancini on July 22, 2009 and is headquartered in East Rutherford, NJ.
info.description_zh: Mama's Creations, Inc. 從事新鮮熟食食品的營銷、製造和分銷。該公司的產品包括牛肉丸、火雞肉丸、釀肉丸、烤寬麵條捲、零售即食食品、散裝熟食店、單一尺寸義大利麵碗和包裝冷藏產品。其品牌包括 MamaMancini's、Crown 1、Creative Salads 和 The Olive Branch。該公司由 Daniel Dougherty 和 Daniel Mancini 於 2009 年 7 月 22 日創立，總部位於新澤西州東盧瑟福。

info.description: Valero Energy Corp. engages in the manufacture and marketing of transportation fuels and other petrochemical products. It operates through the following business segments: Refining, Ethanol and Renewable Diesel. The Refining segment consists of refining operations, associated marketing activities, and logistics assets that support its refining operations. The Ethanol segment includes its ethanol operations, associated marketing activities, and logistics assets that support its ethanol operations. The Renewable Diesel covers the operations of Diamond Green Diesel Holdings LLC. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in San Antonio, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油與天然氣精煉與行銷
info.description_zh: Valero Energy Corp. 從事運輸燃料和其他石化產品的製造和行銷。它透過以下業務部門運作：煉油、乙醇和再生柴油。煉油部門包括煉油業務、相關行銷活動以及支援煉油業務的物流資產。乙醇部門包括其乙醇業務、相關行銷活動以及支持其乙醇業務的物流資產。再生柴油涵蓋 Diamond Green Diesel Holdings LLC 的營運。該公司成立於 1980 年，總部位於德克薩斯州聖安東尼奧。

info.description: The Kroger Co. engages in the retail grocery business with added convenience to retail pharmacies and fuel centers. Its main focus is on growing households and increasing customer loyalty by delivering great value and convenience, and investing in four strategic pillars: Fresh, Brands, Data & Personalization and Seamless. Its brands include Big K, Smart Way, Heritage Farm, Simple Truth, and Simple Truth Organic. The company was founded by Barney Kroger in 1883 and is headquartered in Cincinnati, OH.
info.description_zh: 克羅格公司從事零售雜貨業務，為零售藥局和加油中心提供更多便利。其主要重點是透過提供巨大的價值和便利性來增加家庭數量並提高客戶忠誠度，並投資於四個策略支柱：新鮮度、品牌、數據和個人化以及無縫。其品牌包括 Big K、Smart Way、Heritage Farm、Simple Truth 和 Simple Truth Organic。該公司由 Barney Kroger 於 1883 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州辛辛那提。

info.description: ProShares UltraShort Nasdaq Biotechnology seeks daily investment results that correspond to two times the inverse (-2x) of the daily performance of the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index. The fund invests in financial instruments that ProShare Advisors believes, in combination, should produce daily returns consistent with the fund's investment objective. The index is a modified capitalization weighted index that includes securities of Nasdaq listed companies that are classified as either biotechnology or pharmaceutical. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: ProShares UltraShort 納斯達克生物技術尋求相當於納斯達克生物技術指數每日表現的兩倍（-2x）的每日投資結果。該基金投資於 ProShare Advisors 認為綜合起來應產生與基金投資目標一致的每日回報的金融工具。該指數是修改後的資本加權指數，包括納斯達克上市公司的證券，這些公司被分類為生物技術或製藥。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: TAT Technologies Ltd. provides a variety of services and products to the commercial and military aerospace and ground defense industries. It operates through the following business segments: Original Equipment Manufacturing (OEM) of Heat Transfer Solutions & Aviation Accessories; Maintenance, Repair & Overhaul Services (MRO) Services for Heat Transfer Components & OEM of Heat Transfer Solutions; MRO Services for Aviation Components; and Overhaul and Coating of Jet Engine Components. The OME of Heat Transfer Solutions & Aviation Accessories segment include the design, development and manufacture of broad range of heat transfer solutions, such as pre-coolers heat exchangers and oil/fuel hydraulic heat exchangers, used in mechanical and electronic systems on board commercial, military and business aircraft; environmental control and power electronics cooling systems installed on board aircraft in and ground applications; and a variety of other mechanical aircraft accessories and systems such as pumps, valves, and turbine power units. The MRO Services for Heat Transfer Components & OEM of Heat Transfer Solutions segment include the MRO of heat transfer components and to a lesser extent, the manufacturing of certain heat transfer solutions. The MRO Services for Aviation Components segment includes the MRO of APUs, landing gears and other aircraft components. The Overhaul and Coating of Jet Engine Components segment includes the overhaul and coating of jet engine components, including turbine vanes and blades, fan blades, variable inlet guide vanes and afterburner flaps. The company was founded in April 1985 and is headquartered in Netanya, Israel.
info.description_zh: TAT Technologies Ltd. 為商業和軍事航空航天以及地面防禦行業提供各種服務和產品。它透過以下業務部門運作：傳熱解決方案和航空配件的原始設備製造（OEM）；傳熱組件的維護、維修和大修服務 (MRO) 服務以及傳熱解決方案的 OEM；航空零件的 MRO 服務；噴射引擎零件的檢修和塗層。傳熱解決方案和航空配件的 OME 部門包括設計、開發和製造廣泛的傳熱解決方案，例如預冷器熱交換器和油/燃料液壓熱交換器，用於商用、軍用和公務飛機上的機械和電子系統；安裝在飛機上和地面應用中的環境控制和電力電子冷卻系統；以及各種其他機械飛機配件和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪系統，例如機械機門和渦輪機系統，例如傳熱組件的 MRO 服務和傳熱解決方案的 OEM 部門包括傳熱組件的 MRO 以及較小程度的某些傳熱解決方案的製造。航空零件MRO服務部門包括APU、起落架和其他飛機零件的MRO。噴射發動機部件的大修和塗層部門包括噴射發動機部件的大修和塗層，包括渦輪靜葉和葉片、風扇葉片、可變入口導葉和加力燃燒室襟翼。該公司成立於1985年4月，總部位於以色列內坦亞。

info.description: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of ONS-5010/LYTENAVA. Its pipeline includes unmet patient needs, repackaged IV bevacizumab, and anti-VEGF. The company was founded by Pankaj Mohan on January 5, 2010 and is headquartered in Iselin, NJ.
info.description_zh: Outlook Therapeutics, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，從事ONS-5010/LYTENAVA的開發。其產品線包括未滿足的患者需求、重新包裝的靜脈注射貝伐單抗和抗 VEGF。該公司由 Pankaj Mohan 於 2010 年 1 月 5 日創立，總部位於新澤西州艾斯林。

info.description: Tuttle Capital Daily 2X Inverse Regional Banks ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the inverse (or opposite) of the daily performance of the KRE ETF. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests in swap agreements that provide 200% inverse (opposite) daily exposure to TSLA equal to at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes ). The fund advisor seeks daily leveraged inverse investment results and the fund is very different from most other exchange-traded funds and presents different and greater risks. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Tuttle Capital Daily 2X Inverse Regional Banks ETF 尋求每日投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 KRE ETF 每日表現的 200% 倒數（或相反）。在正常情況下，該基金投資於掉期協議，該協議提供 200% 的 TSLA 每日反向（相反）敞口，相當於該基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）的至少 80%。基金顧問尋求每日槓桿反向投資結果，該基金與大多數其他交易所交易基金有很大不同，並呈現不同且更大的風險。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: EchoStar Corp. engages in the design, development, and distribution of digital set-top boxes and products for direct-to-home satellite service providers. It operates through the following business segments: Pay-TV, Retail Wireless, and Broadband and Satellite Services. The Pay-TV segment business strategy is to be the best provider of video services in the United States by providing products with the best technology, outstanding customer service, and great value. The Retail Wireless segment offers Retail Wireless services as well as a competitive portfolio of wireless devices. The Broadband and Satellite Services segment business strategy is to maintain and improve leadership position and competitive advantage through development of technologies and services marketed to selected sectors within the consumer, enterprise and government markets globally. The company was founded by Charlie William Ergen, Candy Ergen, and James DeFranco in 1980 and is headquartered in Englewood, CO.
info.description_zh: EchoStar Corp. 為直接到戶衛星服務供應商設計、開發和分銷數位機上盒和產品。它透過以下業務部門運作：付費電視、零售無線以及寬頻和衛星服務。付費電視部門的業務策略是透過提供具有最佳技術、出色的客戶服務和巨大價值的產品，成為美國最好的視訊服務供應商。零售無線部門提供零售無線服務以及具競爭力的無線設備組合。寬頻和衛星服務部門的商業策略是透過開發向全球消費者、企業和政府市場中選定部門銷售的技術和服務來維持和提高領導地位和競爭優勢。該公司由 Charlie William Ergen、Candy Ergen 和 James DeFranco 於 1980 年創立，總部位於科羅拉多州恩格爾伍德。

info.description: Falcon's Beyond Global, Inc. is an experiential entertainment development enterprise. The firm connects the world by bringing stories to life through theme parks, resorts, animation, consumer products, gaming, and movies. It operates through the following segments: Falcon's Creative Group, PDP, Destinations Operations, and Falcon's Beyond Brands. The Falcon's Creative Group segment creates master plans, designs attractions and experiential entertainment, and produces content, interactives, and software. The Falcon's Beyond Brands segment focuses on brands and intellectual property to life through animation, movies, licensing and merchandising, gaming, as well as ride and technology sales. The company was founded on July 8, 2022 and is headquartered in Orlando, FL.
info.description_zh: 方墾Beyond Global, Inc.是一家體驗式娛樂開發企業。該公司透過主題樂園、度假村、動畫、消費品、遊戲和電影將故事帶入生活，從而連接世界。該公司透過以下部門運作：方墾創意集團、PDP、目的地營運部門和方墾超越品牌部門。方墾創意集團部門負責制定整體規劃、設計景點和體驗式娛樂，並製作內容、互動產品和軟體。方墾的超越品牌部門專注於透過動畫、電影、授權和銷售、遊戲以及遊樂設施和技術銷售來實現品牌和智慧財產權。該公司成立於2022年7月8日，總部位於佛羅裡達州奧蘭多。

info.description: Interactive Strength, Inc. engages in the development and sale of an at-home fitness technology platform. It offers Forme, a digital fitness service that combines fitness hardware products with personal training and coaching services. It operates under the following geographical segments: the United States, the United Kingdom, and Taiwan. The company was founded by Trent A. Ward and Ben Bartlett on May 8, 2017 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Interactive Strength, Inc. 從事家庭健身技術平台的開發與銷售。它提供 Forme，一種數位健身服務，將健身硬體產品與個人訓練和輔導服務結合。它在以下地理區域運作：美國、英國和台灣。該公司由 Trent A. Ward 和 Ben Bartlett 於 2017 年 5 月 8 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: PicoCELA, Inc. engages in the manufacturing, installation, and services for enterprise wireless mesh solutions. It also offers wireless multi-hop relay devices. The company was founded by Hiroshi Furukawa on August 8, 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
info.description_zh: PicoCELA, Inc. 從事企業無線網狀網路解決方案的製造、安裝和服務。它還提供無線多跳中繼設備。該公司由Hiroshi Furukawa於2008年8月8日創立，總部位於日本東京。

info.description: HCW Biologics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing novel immunotherapies to lengthen health span by disrupting the link between chronic, low-grade inflammation, and age-related diseases. The firm considers age-related low-grade chronic inflammation as a contributing factor to several chronic diseases and conditions, such as cancer, cardiovascular disease, diabetes, neurodegenerative diseases, and autoimmune diseases. The company was founded by Hing C. Wong on April 2, 2018 and is headquartered in Miramar, FL.
info.description_zh: HCW Biologics Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，專注於發現和開發新型免疫療法，透過破壞慢性、低度發炎和年齡相關疾病之間的關聯來延長健康壽命。該公司認為與年齡相關的低度慢性發炎是導致多種慢性疾病和病症的因素，例如癌症、心血管疾病、糖尿病、神經退化性疾病和自體免疫疾病。該公司由 Hing C. Wong 於 2018 年 4 月 2 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州米拉瑪。

info.description: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. engages in the development and innovation of molecular tools for detection of infectious diseases, liquid biopsy for cancer screening, and agricultural applications. Its diagnostics systems enable very rapid, low-cost, molecular testing for organisms and genetic diseases by automating historically complex procedures in both the development and administration of tests. The company was founded by Brent C. Satterfield and Dwight Howard Egan on April 18, 2013 and is headquartered in Salt Lake City, UT.
info.description_zh: Co-Diagnostics, Inc. 致力於傳染病檢測分子工具、癌症篩檢液體活檢和農業應用的開發和創新。其診斷系統透過自動化測試開發和管理中歷史上複雜的程序，實現了對生物體和遺傳疾病的非常快速、低成本的分子測試。該公司由 Brent C. Satterfield 和 Dwight Howard Egan 於 2013 年 4 月 18 日創立，總部位於猶他州鹽湖城。

info.description: NextNRG, Inc. engages in the provision of fuel delivery services. It provides app-based interface customers with the ability to select the time and location of their fueling. It offers diesel, red diesel, and REC-90. The company was founded by Yehuda Levy and Michael D. Farkas on March 28, 2019 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 再生能源
info.description_zh: NextNRG, Inc. 從事提供燃料輸送服務。它為基於應用程式的介面客戶提供了選擇加油時間和地點的能力。它提供柴油、紅柴油和 REC-90。該公司由 Yehuda Levy 和 Michael D. Farkas 於 2019 年 3 月 28 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: MetaVia, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in developing and commercializing multi-modal disease-modifying therapies. Its pipeline includes ANA001, a proprietary oral niclosamide formulation, Gemcabene, which is assessed as an acute indication for COVID-19, NB-01, a treatment for painful diabetic neuropathy, and NB-02, which has the potential to treat the symptoms of cognitive impairment and modify the progression of neurodegenerative diseases. The company was founded on October 30, 2014 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: MetaVia, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，致力於開發和商業化多模式疾病緩解療法。其產品線包括 ANA001（一種專有的口服氯硝柳胺製劑）、Gemcabene（被評估為 COVID-19 的急性適應症）、NB-01（一種治療疼痛性糖尿病神經病變的藥物）和 NB-02（有潛力治療認知障礙症狀並改變神經退化性疾病的進展）。該公司成立於2014年10月30日，總部位於麻薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: GeoVax Labs, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development of human vaccines and immunotherapies against infectious diseases and solid tumor cancers using novel proprietary platforms. It focuses on preventive vaccines against hemorrhagic fever viruses such as Ebola-Zaire, Ebola-Sudan, Lassa, Marburg, Zika virus and malaria. The company was founded in June 1988 and is headquartered in Smyrna, GA.
info.description_zh: GeoVax Labs, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，利用新型專有平台開發針對傳染病和實體瘤的人類疫苗和免疫療法。它的重點是針對伊波拉扎伊爾病毒、蘇丹伊波拉病毒、拉沙病毒、馬堡病毒、寨卡病毒和瘧疾等出血熱病毒的預防性疫苗。該公司成立於 1988 年 6 月，總部位於喬治亞州士麥那。

info.description: Wetour Robotics Ltd. operates as a holding company. It engages in the provision of mobility solutions with artificial intelligence augmented online support and itinerary management support. The firm offers shuttle, customized chartered bus, packaged tour, and other services to customers. The company was founded on February 10, 2022 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
info.description_zh: Wetour Robotics Ltd. 以控股公司方式營運。它致力於提供具有人工智慧增強線上支援和行程管理支援的行動解決方案。該公司為客戶提供接駁車、客製化包車、跟團遊等服務。公司成立於2022年2月10日，總部位於中國杭州。

info.description: Amesite, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the development and marketing of B2C and B2B AI-driven solutions for the healthcare sector. It provides tools and direct connection with working nurses and caregivers through its brand, NurseMagic. The company was founded by Ann Marie Sastry on November 14, 2017 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.description_zh: Amesite, Inc. 是一家科技公司，致力於醫療保健產業 B2C 和 B2B 人工智慧驅動解決方案的開發和行銷。它透過其品牌 NurseMagic 提供工具以及與工作護理師和護理人員的直接聯繫。該公司由 Ann Marie Sastry 於 2017 年 11 月 14 日創立，總部位於密西根州底特律。

info.description: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the sale, distribution, and marketing of diagnostics test kits and med-tech and personal protective equipment products for the prevention, detection, diagnosis, and risk management of viral diseases with a particular interest in the field of immunology. The company was founded by James Foster and Cameron Shaw in 2013 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. 是一家控股公司，從事診斷測試套件以及醫療技術和個人防護設備產品的銷售、分銷和營銷，用於病毒性疾病的預防、檢測、診斷和風險管理，特別關注免疫學領域。該公司由 James Foster 和 Cameron Shaw 於 2013 年創立，總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of space launch vehicles. It offers Alpha, Beta, Gamma, and orbital transfer vehicles. The company was founded by Thomas E. Markusic, Mark Watt, and Max Polyakov in January 27, 2017 and is headquartered in Cedar Park, TX.
info.description_zh: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. 從事航太運載火箭的設計與製造。它提供 Alpha、Beta、Gamma 和軌道運輸工具。該公司由 Thomas E. Markusic、Mark Watt 和 Max Polyakov 於 2017 年 1 月 27 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州錫達帕克。

info.description: CPS Technologies Corp. engages in the provision of advanced material solutions to the transportation, automotive, energy, computing or Internet, telecommunications, aerospace, defense, and oil and gas end markets. The firm focuses on the design, manufacture, and sale of custom metal matrix composite components. It also assembles housings and packages for hybrid circuit. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Norton, MA.
info.description_zh: CPS Technologies Corp. 致力於為交通、汽車、能源、計算或互聯網、電信、航空航太、國防以及石油和天然氣終端市場提供先進材料解決方案。該公司專注於客製化金屬基複合材料零件的設計、製造和銷售。它還組裝混合電路的外殼和封裝。該公司成立於 1984 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州諾頓。

info.description: Generation Income Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment company, which engages in the acquisition and management of retail, office, and industrial properties net leased to tenants. The company was founded by David Sobelman in September 2015 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 多元化
info.description_zh: Generation Income Properties, Inc.是一家房地產投資公司，從事收購和管理淨租賃給租戶的零售、辦公和工業房地產。該公司由 David Sobelman 於 2015 年 9 月創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: Iridium Communications, Inc. operates as a commercial provider of communications services offering true global coverage, connecting people, organizations and assets to and from anywhere, in real time. It offers its services to businesses, the U.S. and foreign governments, non-governmental organizations, and consumers via satellite network, which has an architecture of operational satellites with in-orbit spares and related ground infrastructure. Its products include personal communicators, messengers, and trackers, satellite phones, push-to-talk-devices, broadband terminals, midband terminals, external antennas, docking stations, apps, accessories and developer tools & resources. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in McLean, VA.
info.description_zh: Iridium Communications, Inc. 是一家通訊服務商業供應商，提供真正的全球覆蓋，將人員、組織和資產即時連接到任何地方。它透過衛星網路向企業、美國和外國政府、非政府組織和消費者提供服務，該網路具有運行衛星、在軌備件和相關地面基礎設施的架構。其產品包括個人通訊器、通訊器和追蹤器、衛星電話、一鍵通設備、寬頻終端、中頻終端、外部天線、擴充座、應用程式、配件以及開發工具和資源。該公司成立於 2000 年，總部位於維吉尼亞州麥克萊恩。

info.description: MindWalk Holdings Corp. is an AI-driven biotherapeutic research, technology, and scientifically robust life science company that discovers and develops customized and novel antibodies by generating proprietary and patented processes, procedures, and innovative approaches to antibody discovery, development, and production. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States of America, Europe, Canada, Australia, and Other. The company was founded by Robert Beecroft on November 22, 1983 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: MindWalk Holdings Corp. 是一家由人工智慧驅動的生物治療研究、技術和科學穩健的生命科學公司，透過產生抗體發現、開發和生產的專有和專利流程、程序和創新方法來發現和開發定制的新型抗體。它透過以下地理區域運作：美國、歐洲、加拿大、澳洲和其他地區。該公司由 Robert Beecroft 於 1983 年 11 月 22 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: InMed Pharmaceuticals, Inc. engages in developing small molecule drug candidates targeting the CB1/CB2 receptors. It operates through the InMed Pharma and BayMedica Commercial segments. The InMed Pharma segment focuses on research and development. The BayMedica Commercial segment refers to manufacturing technologies to produce and commercialize bulk cannabinoids for sale as ingredients in the health and wellness industry. The company was founded by Christopher Bogart, Sazzad Hossain, Hyder A. Khoja, and Craig D. Schneider on May 19, 1981 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: InMed Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 致力於開發針對 CB1/CB2 受體的小分子候選藥物。它透過 InMed Pharma 和 BayMedica Commercial 部門運作。 InMed Pharma 部門專注於研究和開發。 BayMedica Commercial 部門是指生產和商業化散裝大麻素的製造技術，以作為健康和保健行業的成分進行銷售。該公司由 Christopher Bogart、Sazzad Hossain、Hyder A. Khoja 和 Craig D. Schneider 於 1981 年 5 月 19 日創立，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: PhenixFIN Corp. is an internally-managed non-diversified closed-end management investment company. Its investment objective is to generate current income and capital appreciation. The company was founded on April 23, 2010 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: PhenixFIN Corp. 是一家內部管理的非多元化封閉式管理投資公司。其投資目標是產生當期收入和資本增值。該公司成立於2010年4月23日，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: PolyPid Ltd. operates as a phase 3 biopharma company. Its proprietary PLEX technology pairs with medications, enables precise delivery of drugs at effective release rates, over pre-determined durations ranging from several days to months. The firm's product candidates are designed to address unmet medical needs by delivering active pharmaceutical ingredients, or APIs, locally at predetermined release rates and durations over extended periods ranging from days to several months. The company was founded by Noam Emanuel on February 28, 2008 and is headquartered in Petach Tikva, Israel.
info.description_zh: PolyPid Ltd. 作為一家三期生物製藥公司運營。其專有的 PLEX 技術與藥物相結合，能夠在幾天到幾個月的預定持續時間內以有效的釋放速率精確輸送藥物。該公司的候選產品旨在透過在本地以預定的釋放速率和持續時間（從幾天到幾個月不等）提供活性藥物成分（API）來滿足未滿足的醫療需求。該公司由Noam Emanuel於2008年2月28日創立，總部位於以色列佩塔提克瓦。

info.description: JX Luxventure Group, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, distribution, and sale of casual menswear. It operates through the following segments: Tourism Products, Technology, and Cross-Board Merchandise. The The company was founded by Anna Polemis on January 26, 2012, and is headquartered in Haikou, China.

info.description: Lifetime Brands, Inc. provides kitchenware and tableware products. It operates through the following segments: U.S. and International. The U.S. segment includes the domestic operations of the Company's business that design, market and distribute its products to retailers, distributors and directly to consumers through retail websites. The International segment includes business operations conducted outside the United States. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Garden City, NY.
info.description_zh: Lifetime Brands, Inc. 提供廚具和餐具產品。它透過以下部門運作：美國部門和國際部門。美國部門包括該公司的國內業務，即向零售商、分銷​​商以及透過零售網站直接向消費者設計、行銷和分銷其產品。國際部門包括在美國境外開展的業務運作。該公司成立於 1945 年，總部位於紐約州花園城。

info.description: Stran & Co., Inc. engages in the provision of promotional marketing and branded merchandise services. It offers promotional product, custom manufacturing, custom packaging, warehousing, and program management. The company was founded by Andrew Shape and Andrew Stranberg in 1994 and is headquartered in Quincy, MA.
info.description_zh: Stran & Co., Inc. 從事提供促銷行銷和品牌商品服務。它提供促銷產品、客製化製造、客製化包裝、倉儲和專案管理。該公司由 Andrew Shape 和 Andrew Stranberg 於 1994 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州昆西。

info.description: Fortress Biotech, Inc. engages in the manufacture and commercialization of novel pharmaceutical products and product candidates. It operates through the Dermatology Product Sales and Pharmaceutical and Biotechnology Product Development segments. Its products include Ximino, Targadox, Exelderm, Ceracade, and Luxamend. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Bay Harbor Islands, FL.
info.description_zh: Fortress Biotech, Inc. 從事新型醫藥產品和候選產品的製造和商業化。它透過皮膚科產品銷售以及製藥和生物技術產品開發部門進行營運。其產品包括 Ximino、Targadox、Exelderm、Ceracade 和 Luxamend。該公司成立於 2006 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州灣港群島。

info.description: TransAct Technologies, Inc. engages in the operation of a software-driven technology and printing solutions company. The company was founded in June 1996 and is headquartered in Hamden, CT.
info.description_zh: TransAct Technologies, Inc. 從事軟體驅動技術和列印解決方案公司的營運。該公司成立於 1996 年 6 月，總部位於康乃狄克州哈姆登。

info.description: ImmuCell Corp. engages in the development, acquisition, manufacture, and sale of products that improve the health and productivity of cows for the dairy and beef industries. It operates through the following segments: Scours and Mastitis. The Scours segment consists of the First Defense product line. The Mastitis segment includes the CMT product line consisting of reagents and equipment used for rapid cow-side testing to identify mastitic quarters by detecting elevated somatic cell counts. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Portland, ME.
info.description_zh: ImmuCell Corp. 從事開發、收購、製造和銷售可改善乳製品和牛肉行業乳牛健康和生產力的產品。它透過以下部分運作：腹瀉和乳腺炎。 Scours 部門由 First Defense 產品線組成。乳房炎部門包括 CMT 產品線，該產品線由用於快速牛側檢測的試劑和設備組成，透過檢測升高的體細胞計數來識別乳房病區。該公司成立於 1982 年，總部位於緬因州波特蘭。

info.description: Lixiang Education Holding Co., Ltd. operates as an investment holding company, which engages in the provision of education services. It offers kindergarten, private primary, and secondary levels. The company was founded by Fen Ye in August 2001 and is headquartered in Lishui, China.
info.description_zh: 理想教育控股有限公司是一家投資控股公司，主要提供教育服務。它提供幼兒園、私立小學和中學。該公司由葉芬於2001年8月創立，總部位於中國麗水。

info.description: ICU Medical, Inc. engages in the provision of innovative medical products used in infusion therapy and critical care applications. Its product portfolio includes IV smart pumps, sets, connectors, closed system transfer devices for hazardous drugs, sterile IV solutions, cardiac monitoring systems, along with pain management and safety software technology designed to help meet clinical, safety and workflow goals. The company was founded by George A. Lopez in 1984 and is headquartered in San Clemente, CA.
info.description_zh: ICU Medical, Inc. 致力於提供輸液治療和重症監護應用的創新醫療產品。其產品組合包括靜脈注射智慧幫浦、套件、連接器、危險藥物封閉系統傳輸設備、無菌靜脈注射解決方案、心臟監測系統，以及旨在幫助實現臨床、安全和工作流程目標的疼痛管理和安全軟體技術。該公司由 George A. Lopez 於 1984 年創立，總部位於加州聖克萊門特。

info.description: Steven Madden Ltd. engages in the design, marketing, and sale of fashion-forward footwear for women, men, and children. It operates through the following segments: Wholesale Footwear, Wholesale Accessories and Apparel, Direct-to-Consumer, First Cost, and Licensing. The Wholesale Footwear segment includes branded and private label women's, men's, girl's and children's footwear. The Wholesale Accessories and Apparel segment consists of branded and private label handbags, belts and small leather goods, and cold weather and selected other fashion accessories. The Direct-to-Consumer segment distributes branded footwear, apparel and accessories directly to the consumer. The First Cost segment earns commissions and design fees for serving as a buying agent of footwear products to mass-market merchandisers, mid-tier department stores, and other retailers. The Licensing segment licenses its trademarks for use in connection with the manufacture, marketing, and sale of outerwear, hosiery, active wear, sleepwear, jewelry, watches, hair accessories, umbrellas, bedding, luggage, and men's leather accessories. The company was founded by Steven L. Madden on July 9, 1990 and is headquartered in Long Island City, NY.
info.description_zh: Steven Madden Ltd. 從事時尚前衛女鞋、男鞋和兒童鞋類的設計、行銷和銷售。該公司透過以下部門運作：鞋類批發部門、配件和服裝批發部門、直接面向消費者部門、首次成本部門和許可部門。批發鞋類部門包括品牌和自有品牌女鞋、男鞋、女童鞋和兒童鞋。批發配件和服裝部門包括品牌和自有品牌手袋、皮帶和小皮具，以及寒冷天氣和精選的其他時尚配件。直接面向消費者部門直接向消費者分銷品牌鞋類、服裝和配件。 First Cost 部門以大眾市場商家、中型百貨公司和其他零售商的鞋類產品採購代理賺取佣金和設計費用。許可部門許可其商標用於外套、襪子、運動服、睡衣、珠寶、手錶、髮飾、雨傘、床上用品、行李箱和男士皮革配件的製造、行銷和銷售。該公司由 Steven L. Madden 於 1990 年 7 月 9 日創立，總部位於紐約長島市。

info.description: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF seeks to replicate as closely as possible, before fees and expenses, the price and yield performance of the MVIS US Listed Pharmaceutical 25 Index. The fund normally invests at least 80% of its total assets in securities that comprise the fund's benchmark index. The index includes common stocks and depositary receipts of U.S. exchange-listed companies in the pharmaceutical industry. Such companies may include medium-capitalization companies and foreign companies that are listed on a U.S. exchange. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF 尋求盡可能接近複製 MVIS 美國上市製藥 25 指數的價格和收益率表現（未計費用和支出）。該基金通常將其總資產的至少 80% 投資於構成該基金基準指數的證券。該指數包括美國交易所上市的製藥業公司的普通股和存託憑證。此類公司可能包括中等資本公司和在美國交易所上市的外國公司。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Janus Henderson Mid Cap Growth Alpha ETF seeks to provide long-term growth of capital. The fund will, under normal circumstances, invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes) in equity securities of mid-capitalization ("mid cap") companies selected for their growth potential. The advisor uses an active, systematic strategy designed to select mid-sized capitalization growth stocks using a proprietary quantitative methodology.
info.description_zh: Janus Henderson Mid Cap Growth Alpha ETF 尋求長期資本成長。在正常情況下，該基金將至少80%的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款金額）投資於因其成長潛力而選擇的中等市值（「中盤」）公司的股本證券。該顧問採用主動、系統化的策略，旨在使用專有的定量方法選擇中等市值的成長型股票。

info.description: Adial Pharmaceuticals, Inc. engages in the development of therapeutics for the treatment or prevention of addiction and related disorders. It offers the AD04, a selective serotonin-3 antagonist. The company was founded by Bankole A. Johnson and William B. Stilley, III in November 2010 and is headquartered in Glen Allen, VA.
info.description_zh: Adial Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 從事治療或預防成癮及相關疾病的療法的開發。它提供 AD04，一種選擇性 5-羥色胺-3 拮抗劑。該公司由 Bankole A. Johnson 和 William B. Stilley, III 於 2010 年 11 月創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州格倫艾倫。

info.description: ARS Core Equity Portfolio ETF seeks to achieve long-term growth of capital and generate current income. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes) in equity securities or ETFs that provide exposure to equity securities. For purposes of the fund's 80% policy, the managers define equity securities as common stock or securities with similar characteristics, including American Depositary Receipts ("ADRs"). The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: ARS 核心股票投資組合 ETF 旨在實現資本的長期成長並產生當前收入。在正常情況下，基金將至少80%的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款金額）投資於股本證券或提供股本證券敞口的ETF。就基金的 80% 政策而言，管理人將股本證券定義為普通股或具有類似特徵的證券，包括美國存託憑證（「ADR」）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM Index. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is designed to track the performance of a subset of stocks within the Nasdaq-100 Index (the "Parent Index") that have exhibited the least volatility over the past 12 months, as determined by the index provider. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF 旨在追蹤 Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM 指數的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數旨在追蹤納斯達克 100 指數（「母指數」）內部分股票的表現，這些股票在過去 12 個月內波動性最小（由指數提供者確定）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Westwood Salient Enhanced Energy Income ETF seeks to provide current income and capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks to achieve its investment objectives by investing, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus the amount of borrowings, if any, for investment purposes) in securities of Midstream North American corporations and Midstream U.S. master limited partnerships ("MLPs") (collectively, "Midstream Investments"). The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Westwood Salient 增強型能源收入 ETF 旨在提供當前收入和資本增值。該基金是主動管理型 ETF，在正常情況下，透過將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款金額，如果有）投資於中游北美公司和中游美國主有限合夥企業（「MLP」）（統稱為「中游投資」）的證券來實現其投資目標。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Pulmonx Corp. is a medical technology company, which engages in the provision of interventional pulmonology, planning tools and treatments for obstructive lung diseases. It operates through the United States, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia Pacific, and Other International segments. The company was founded by Rodney Perkins on December 26, 1995 and is headquartered in Redwood City, CA.
info.description_zh: Pulmonx Corp. 是一家醫療科技公司，致力於為阻塞性肺病提供介入性肺病學、規劃工具和治療。它透過美國、歐洲、中東、非洲、亞太地區和其他國際部門開展業務。該公司由 Rodney Perkins 於 1995 年 12 月 26 日創立，總部位於加州雷德伍德市。

info.description: WEBs Defined Volatility XLRE ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLRE Index. The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the real estate sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs Defined Volatility XLRE ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax Defined Volatility XLRE 指數表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大盤股市場房地產行業公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Kinder Morgan, Inc. engages in providing pipeline transportation of natural gas services. It operates through the following business segments: Natural Gas Pipelines, Products Pipelines, Terminals, and CO2. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment operates major interstate and intrastate natural gas pipelines and storage systems. The Products Pipelines segment is involved in the operation of refined petroleum products, crude oil, and condensate pipelines. The Terminals segment includes the operation of liquids and bulk terminal facilities that store and handle various commodities. The CO2 segment produces, transports, and markets to oil fields that use CO2 as a flooding medium to increase recovery and production of crude oil from mature oil fields. The company was founded by Richard D. Kinder and William V. Morgan in February 1997 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Kinder Morgan, Inc. 從事提供天然氣管道運輸服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：天然氣管道、產品管道、碼頭和二氧化碳。天然氣管道部門運作主要的州際和州內天然氣管道和儲存系統。產品管道部門從事成品油、原油和凝析油管道的營運。碼頭部門包括經營儲存和處理各種商品的液體和散裝碼頭設施。二氧化碳部門生產、運輸並向使用二氧化碳作為驅油介質的油田銷售，以提高成熟油田原油的採收率和產量。該公司由 Richard D. Kinder 和 William V. Morgan 於 1997 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Alpha Compute Corp. is a technology company scaling the Telegram super app, a strategic reserve of digital assets. The firm implements a comprehensive M&A and treasury strategy that combines direct digital assets acquisition, validator operations, and strategic ecosystem investments to generate sustainable returns for shareholders. The company was founded by Gregory H. Bailey and James Mellon in 1973 and is headquartered in Road Town, British Virgin Islands.
info.description_zh: Alpha Compute Corp. 是一家擴展 Telegram 超級應用程式（數位資產策略儲備）的科技公司。該公司實施全面的併購和財務策略，將直接數位資產收購、驗證器營運和策略生態系統投資結合起來，為股東創造可持續的回報。該公司由 Gregory H. Bailey 和 James Mellon 於 1973 年創立，總部位於英屬維京群島羅德城。

info.description: Blueport Acquisition Ltd. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 13, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Blueport Acquisition Ltd. 以空白支票公司經營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年1月13日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: M Evo Global Acquisition Corp II operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 11, 2025 and is headquartered in Farmers Branch, TX.
info.description_zh: M Evo Global Acquisition Corp II 以空白支票公司經營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月11日，總部位於德克薩斯州法默斯布蘭奇。

info.description: ChampionsGate Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 27, 2024 and is headquartered in Monterey, CA.
info.description_zh: ChampionsGate Acquisition Corp. 作为一家空白支票公司运营，其成立目的是与一个或多个企业进行合并、股份交换、资产收购、股份购买、重组或类似业务合并。該公司成立於2024年3月27日，總部位於加州蒙特雷。

info.description: Dynamix Corp. III is a blank check company. It was created for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination. The company was founded on June 20, 2025 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Dynamix Corp. III 是一家空白支票公司。它的創建目的是為了實現合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年6月20日，總部位於德州休士頓。

info.description: State Street My2030 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2030. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2030.
info.description_zh: State Street My2030 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2030 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時在接近 2030 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時尋求最大化當前收入並保留資本。

info.description: Baxter International, Inc. engages in the provision of a portfolio of essential healthcare products including acute and chronic dialysis therapies, sterile intravenous (IV) solutions, infusion systems and devices, parenteral nutrition therapies, inhaled anesthetics, generic injectable pharmaceuticals, surgical hemostat and sealant products, surgical equipment, smart bed systems, patient monitoring and diagnostic technologies, and respiratory health devices. It operates through the following segments: Medical Products and Therapies, Healthcare Systems and Technologies, and Pharmaceuticals. The Medical Products and Therapies segment includes sales of sterile IV solutions, infusion systems, administration sets, parenteral nutrition therapies and surgical hemostat, sealant, and adhesion prevention products. The Healthcare Systems and Technologies segment sells connected care solutions and collaboration tools, including smart bed systems, patient monitoring systems and diagnostic technologies, respiratory health devices and advanced equipment for the surgical space, including operating room integration technologies, precision positioning devices, and other accessories. The Pharmaceuticals segment focuses on the sales of specialty injectable pharmaceuticals, inhaled anesthetics, and drug compounding services. The company was founded by Davis Baxter in 1931 and is headquartered in Deerfield, IL.
info.description_zh: Baxter International, Inc. 從事提供一系列基本醫療保健產品，包括急性和慢性透析療法、無菌靜脈 (IV) 解決方案、輸液系統和設備、腸外營養療法、吸入麻醉劑、非專利注射藥物、手術止血劑和密封劑產品、手術設備、智慧床系統、患者監測和診斷技術以及呼吸健康設備。它透過以下部門運作：醫療產品和療法、醫療保健系統和技術以及製藥。醫療產品和治療部門包括銷售無菌靜脈注射溶液、輸液系統、給藥裝置、腸外營養療法和手術止血劑、密封劑和預防沾黏產品。醫療保健系統和技術部門銷售互聯護理解決方案和協作工具，包括智慧床系統、病患監護系統和診斷技術、呼吸健康設備和手術空間的先進設備，包括手術室整合技術、精密定位設備和其他配件。藥品部門專注於特種注射藥品、吸入麻醉劑和藥物配製服務的銷售。該公司由 Davis Baxter 於 1931 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州迪爾菲爾德。

info.description: Merck & Co., Inc. is a health care company, which engages in the provision of health solutions through its prescription medicines, vaccines, biologic therapies, animal health, and consumer care products. It operates through the following segments: Pharmaceutical, Animal Health, and Other. The Pharmaceutical segment includes human health pharmaceutical and vaccine products. The Animal Health segment discovers, develops, manufactures, and markets animal health products, such as pharmaceutical and vaccine products, for the prevention, treatment and control of disease in livestock, and companion animal species. The Other segment consists of sales for the non-reportable segments of healthcare services. The company was founded in 1891 and is headquartered in Rahway, NJ.
info.description_zh: 默克公司是一家醫療保健公司，透過其處方藥、疫苗、生物療法、動物保健和消費者護理產品提供健康解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：製藥部門、動物保健部門和其他部門。製藥部門包括人類健康藥品和疫苗產品。動物保健部門發現、開發、製造和銷售動物保健產品，例如藥品和疫苗產品，用於預防、治療和控制牲畜和伴侶動物物種的疾病。其他部門包括醫療服務非報告部門的銷售。該公司成立於 1891 年，總部位於新澤西州羅威。

info.description: Air T, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of overnight air freight service to the express delivery industry, manufactures and sells aircraft deicers and other industrial equipment, and provides ground support equipment and facilities maintenance to airlines. It operates through the following segments: Overnight Air Cargo, Ground Equipment Sales, Ground Support Services, Printing Equipment & Maintenance, Commercial Aircrafts Engines & Parts, Printing Equipment & Maintenance and Corporate & Other. The Overnight Air Cargo segment operates in the air express delivery services industry. The Ground Equipment Sales segment manufactures and provides mobile deicers and other specialized equipment products to passenger and cargo airlines, airports, the military and industrial customers. The Ground Support Services segment offers ground support equipment maintenance and facilities maintenance services to domestic airlines and aviation service providers. The Commercial Aircrafts, Engines & Parts segment manages and leases aviation assets, supplies surplus and aftermarket commercial jet engine components, provides commercial aircraft disassembly, part-out services, and commercial aircraft parts sales. The Printing Equipment & Maintenance segment designs, manufactures, and sells advanced digital print production equipment and provides maintenance services to commercial customers. The Corporate & Other segment acts as the capital allocator and resource for other segments. The company was founded on November 17, 1980 and is headquartered in Charlotte, NC.
info.description_zh: Air T, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事向快遞行業提供隔夜航空貨運服務，製造和銷售飛機除冰器和其他工業設備，並向航空公司提供地面支援設備和設施維護。該公司透過以下部門運作：隔夜航空貨運部門、地面設備銷售部門、地面支援服務部門、列印設備及維修部門、商用飛機引擎及零件部門、列印設備及維修部門以及企業及其他部門。隔夜航空貨運部門從事航空快遞服務業。地面設備銷售部門為客運和貨運航空公司、機場、軍事和工業客戶製造和提供行動除冰器和其他專用設備產品。地面保障服務部門為國內航空公司和航空服務提供者提供地面保障設備維護和設施維護服務。商用飛機、發動機和零件部門管理和租賃航空資產，供應剩餘和售後商用噴射發動機零件，提供商用飛機拆解、拆解服務以及商用飛機零件銷售。印刷設備及維修部門設計、製造及銷售先進的數位印刷生產設備，並為商業客戶提供維修服務。公司及其他部門充當其他部門的資本分配者和資源。該公司成立於1980年11月17日，總部位於北卡羅來納州夏洛特。

info.description: Akari Therapeutics Plc is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company. It engages in the development and commercialization of therapeutics to treat orphan autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. The company was founded on October 7, 2004 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.description_zh: Akari Therapeutics Plc 是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司。它致力於治療孤兒自體免疫疾病和發炎性疾病的療法的開發和商業化。該公司成立於2004年10月7日，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: Pacer BlueStar Engineering the Future ETF seeks to track the total return performance, before fees and expenses, of the BlueStar Robotics and 3D Printing Index (the "Index"). The index is a rules-based index that consists of globally-listed stocks and depositary receipts of companies that derive at least 50% of their revenues from Robotics and 3D Printing Companies, as determined by the index provider. The fund adviser will generally use a "replication" strategy to achieve its investment objective, meaning it will invest in all of the component securities of the index. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Pacer BlueStar Engineering the Future ETF 旨在追蹤 BlueStar 機器人和 3D 列印指數（「指數」）扣除費用和開支之前的總回報表現。該指數是一個基於規則的指數，由指數提供者確定的至少 50% 收入來自機器人和 3D 列印公司的全球上市股票和存託憑證組成。基金顧問通常會使用「複製」策略來實現其投資目標，這意味著它將投資於指數的所有組成證券。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Cantor Equity Partners VI, Inc. is a blank check company. It was created for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on April 30, 2021, and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Cantor Equity Partners VI, Inc. 是一家空白支票公司。它的創建目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2021年4月30日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Crane Harbor Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 19, 2025 and is headquartered in Philadelphia, PA.
info.description_zh: Crane Harbour Acquisition Corp. II 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2025年6月19日，總部位於賓州費城。

info.description: BrandywineGLOBAL Dynamic U.S. Large Cap Value ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation by quantitatively investing in U.S. equities. The fund will only invest in U.S. traded companies, which may include companies incorporated outside the U.S. which conduct a significant portion of their activities in the U.S. and are considered U.S. companies in the Russell U.S. indices. In addition, under normal market conditions, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in equity securities of large capitalization companies or other instruments with similar economic characteristics. The fund may have significant positions in particular sectors from time to time.
info.description_zh: BrandywineGLOBAL 動態美國大盤價值 ETF 透過量化投資美國股票來尋求長期資本增值。該基金將僅投資於在美國上市的公司，其中可能包括在美國境外註冊的公司，這些公司的大部分活動在美國進行，並被視為羅素美國指數中的美國公司。此外，在正常市場條件下，該基金至少將其淨資產的80%投資於大型資本公司的股本證券或具有類似經濟特徵的其他工具。該基金可能不時在特定產業持有重要部位。

info.description: WEBs Defined Volatility XLU ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLU Index. The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets (including borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the utilities sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs Defined Volatility XLU ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax Defined Volatility XLU 指數表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產（包括用於投資目的的借款）投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大盤股市場公用事業板塊公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright FSM US Core ETF seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation with capital preservation as a secondary objective. The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that is primarily a "fund of funds." The Advisor seeks to achieve it's investment objective by investing in ETFs that invest primarily in domestic large capitalization equity securities. The fund invests in fixed income ETFs with a short or ultra-short duration, money market funds, cash and cash equivalents ("Defensive Investments"). It may invest in affiliated and unaffiliated ETFs. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in U.S. investments.
info.description_zh: AdvisorShares Dorsey Wright FSM US Core ETF 尋求提供長期資本增值，並將資本保值作為次要目標。該基金是一種主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），主要是「基金中的基金」。該顧問尋求透過投資主要投資於國內大市值股票證券的 ETF 來實現其投資目標。本基金投資於短期或超短期固定收益ETF、貨幣市場基金、現金及現金等價物（「防禦性投資」）。它可以投資關聯和非關聯的 ETF。正常情況下，該基金至少80%的淨資產投資於美國。

info.description: Harmonic, Inc. engages in the development and sale of video delivery software, products, system solutions, and services. It operates through the Video and Broadband segments. The Video segment sells video processing and production and playout services to cable operators, satellite and telecommunications pay-TV service providers, and broadcast and media companies. The Broadband segment offers solutions to cable operators broadband access solutions and related services, including cOS software-based broadband access solution, to broadband operators globally. The company was founded in June 1988 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Harmonic, Inc. 從事視訊傳輸軟體、產品、系統解決方案和服務的開發和銷售。它透過視訊和寬頻部門運作。 The Video segment sells video processing and production and playout services to cable operators, satellite and telecommunications pay-TV service providers, and broadcast and media companies. The Broadway segment accers solutions toelmoc​​ion sar​​st the grautionsirutions 比這software-based broadband access solution, to broadband operators globally.該公司成立於 1988 年 6 月，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Kaixin Holdings operates as a holding company, which engages in the sale of domestic and imported automobiles. It provides superior car purchase and ownership experiences to customers. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
info.description_zh: 開心控股作為一家控股公司運營，從事國產和進口汽車的銷售。它為客戶提供卓越的購車和擁有體驗。公司成立於2015年，總部位於中國杭州。

info.description: Leifras Co., Ltd. is a sports and social business company dedicated to youth sports and community engagement. It primarily provides services related to the organization and operations of sports schools and sports events for children. The firm operates through the following segments: Sports School Business and Social Business. The Sports School Business segment focuses on providing services related to the operation of sports schools and organizing events for children. The Social Business segment provides services including managing extracurricular activities in schools, sports therapy for children with disabilities, and health exercise guidance. The company was founded by Kiyotaka Ito on August 28, 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
info.description_zh: Leifras Co., Ltd. 是一家致力於青少年體育和社區參與的體育和社會商業公司。主要提供體校及兒童體育賽事的組織及運作相關服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：體育學校業務和社會業務。體校業務部門專注於提供與體校運作和兒童活動組織相關的服務。社會業務部門提供的服務包括管理學校的課外活動、殘疾兒童的運動治療以及健康運動指導。該公司由伊藤清隆於2001年8月28日創立，總部位於日本東京。

info.description: MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies, Inc. owns, develops, operates, manages, and supports relaxation salons through the franchising and direct ownership of such salons. It provides relaxation and bodywork services. The firm operates two synergistic lines of businesses: Relaxation Salon Segment (retail) and Digital Preventative Healthcare Segment (healthtech). The company was founded by Kouji Eguchi on July 13, 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
info.description_zh: MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies, Inc. 透過特許經營和直接擁有放鬆沙龍來擁有、開發、經營、管理和支援此類沙龍。它提供放鬆和車身服務。該公司經營兩條協同業務線：放鬆沙龍細分市場（零售）和數位預防醫療保健細分市場（健康科技）。該公司由江口浩司於2000年7月13日創立，總部位於日本東京。

info.description: Research Affiliates Deletions ETF seeks to track the total return performance, before fees and expenses, of the Research Affiliates Deletions Index. The index consists of U.S. equity securities of micro-, small- and mid- capitalization companies that are believed to be value stocks. Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the fund's total assets (exclusive of collateral held from securities lending) will be invested in U.S. equity securities of micro-, small- and mid- companies.
info.description_zh: Research Affiliates Deletions ETF 旨在追蹤 Research Affiliates Deletions Index 扣除費用和開支之前的總回報表現。該指數由被認為是價值股票的微型、小型和中型公司的美國股票證券組成。一般情況下，基金總資產（不包括證券借貸抵押品）的至少80%將投資於中小微型公司的美國股本證券。

info.description: NMP Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on December 18, 2024 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: NMP Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，從事與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2024年12月18日，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Discretionary ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Consumer Discretionary Index (the "underlying index"). The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. These companies are principally engaged in the business of providing consumer goods and services that are cyclical in nature, including, but not limited to, household durables, leisure products and services, apparel and luxury goods, computers and electronics, automobiles and auto components, and hotel and restaurant services.
info.description_zh: Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Discretionary ETF 旨在追蹤 S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Consumer Discretionary Index（「基礎指數」）的投資結果（未計費用和支出）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。這些公司主要從事提供週期性消費品和服務的業務，包括但不限於家庭耐用品、休閒產品和服務、服裝和奢侈品、電腦和電子產品、汽車和汽車零件以及酒店和餐飲服務。

info.description: QTREX Quantum Ltd. is a specialty medical device company, which engages in research, development, manufacturing, and marketing of proprietary life support technology with a vision to supersede traditional mechanical ventilators, or Mechanical Ventilation, which is the standard of care today for the treatment of acute respiratory failure. The company was founded by Dagi Shahar Ben Noon, Joe Hayon, and Udi Nussinovitch in July 2017 and is headquartered in Raanana, Israel.
info.description_zh: QTREX Quantum Ltd. 是一家專業醫療器材公司，從事專有生命支持技術的研究、開發、製造和行銷，其願景是取代傳統的機械呼吸器或機械通氣，這是當今治療急性呼吸衰竭的護理標準。該公司由 Dagi Shahar Ben Noon、Joe Hayon 和 Udi Nussinovitch 於 2017 年 7 月創立，總部位於以色列 Raanana。

info.description: Quantum Computing, Inc. engages in developing novel algorithms and solutions utilizing quantum and quantum-inspired computing to solve difficult problems in various industries. It leverages its expertise in finance, computing, security, mathematics, and physics to develop commercial applications for the financial, security, and government sectors. The company was founded on July 25, 2001 and is headquartered in Hoboken, NJ.
info.description_zh: 量子計算公司致力於利用量子和量子啟發計算開發新穎的演算法和解決方案，以解決各行業的難題。它利用其在金融、計算、安全、數學和物理方面的專業知識，為金融、安全和政府部門開發商業應用。該公司成立於2001年7月25日，總部位於新澤西州霍博肯。

info.description: rYojbaba Co., Ltd. engages in providing consulting and health services to improve and restore physical and mental health diminished by work-related stress. It operates through the Labor Consulting Services and Health Services segments. The Labor Consulting Services segment provides labor and corporate consulting services to foster constructive employment relationships between companies and employees. The Health Services segment provides health services through osteopathic clinics and osteopathic beauty salons to alleviate physical ailments primarily created by work related stress. The company was founded by Masataka Sakai on January 5, 2015 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
info.description_zh: rYojbaba Co., Ltd. 致力於提供諮詢和健康服務，以改善和恢復因工作壓力而受損的身心健康。它透過勞工諮詢服務和健康服務部門運作。勞工諮詢服務部門提供勞工和企業諮詢服務，以促進公司與員工之間的建設性僱傭關係。健康服務部門透過整骨診所和整骨美容院提供健康服務，以緩解主要由工作壓力引起的身體疾病。該公司由Masataka Sakai於2015年1月5日創立，總部位於日本福岡。

info.description: Sidus Space, Inc. is a space-as-a-service company. The firm focuses on commercial satellite design, manufacture, launch planning, mission operations and in-orbit support, and data collection with a vision to demonstrate space operations for new technologies, and deliver data and predictive analytics to both domestic and global customers. The company was founded by Carol M. Craig on July 17, 2012 and is headquartered in Merritt Island, FL.
info.description_zh: Sidus Space, Inc. 是一家空間即服務公司。該公司專注於商業衛星設計、製造、發射規劃、任務操作和在軌支援以及數據收集，旨在展示新技術的空間操作，並向國內和全球客戶提供數據和預測分析。該公司由 Carol M. Craig 於 2012 年 7 月 17 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州梅里特島。

info.description: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. The company was founded on April 1, 2025 and is headquartered in Darien, CT.
info.description_zh: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. 以空白支票公司營運。該公司成立於2025年4月1日，總部位於康乃狄克州達里恩。

info.description: TryHard Holdings Ltd. is a lifestyle entertainment company that operates in Japan offering a diverse range of services across the entertainment and hospitality sectors. It operates through the following business segments: Consultancy and management, Event curation, Sub-leasing and Restaurants. The Consultancy and management segment provides expert services to clubs, including operations, event management, and strategic support to enhance performance and engagement. The Event curation segment organize and produce own events, also provides a full suite of services, including event planning, construction, entertainment booking, event operation, and ticket sales. The Sub-Leasing segment acts as an intermediary between landlords and clubs. The Restaurants segment operates several restaurants. The company was founded on October 16, 2013 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
info.description_zh: TryHard Holdings Ltd. 是一家在日本營運的生活風格娛樂公司，在娛樂和酒店業提供多種服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：諮詢和管理、活動策劃、分租和餐廳。諮詢和管理部門為俱樂部提供專家服務，包括營運、活動管理和策略支持，以提高績效和參與。活動策展部門組織和製作自己的活動，並提供全套服務，包括活動策劃、施工、娛樂預訂、活動運營和門票銷售。轉租部門充當房東和俱樂部之間的中介。餐廳部門經營多家餐廳。公司成立於2013年10月16日，總部位於日本大阪。

info.description: VCI Global Ltd. engages in the provision of business consulting services. It operates through the following segments: Business Strategy Consultancy, Technology Consultancy, and Others. The Business Strategy Consultancy segment offers services relating to listing solutions, investors relations, and boardroom strategies. The Technology Consultancy segment specializes in digital development and software solutions. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
info.description_zh: VCI Global Ltd. 從事提供商業諮詢服務。它透過以下部門運作：業務策略諮詢、技術諮詢和其他。業務策略諮詢部門提供與上市解決方案、投資者關係和董事會策略相關的服務。技術諮詢部門專注於數位開發和軟體解決方案。該公司成立於2013年，總部位於馬來西亞吉隆坡。

info.description: Xsolla SPAC 1 is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The was founded on September 16, 2025 and is headquartered in Sherman Oaks, CA.
info.description_zh: Xsolla SPAC 1 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業實現合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於 2025 年 9 月 16 日，總部位於加州謝爾曼奧克斯。

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF seeks results that correspond generally to the price and yield of an equity index called the Nasdaq Lux Health Tech Index TM (the "index"). The fund will normally invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the common stocks and depositary receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to measure the performance of a selection of companies that are primarily engaged in and involved at the intersection of healthcare and technology, as classified by Lux Capital based on analysis of the products and services offered by those companies. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF 尋求與名為 Nasdaq Lux Health Tech Index TM（「指數」）的股票指數的價格和收益率大致相對應的結果。該基金通常將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在衡量主要從事醫療保健和技術交叉領域的精選公司的業績，Lux Capital 根據對這些公司提供的產品和服務的分析進行分類。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Strategy, Inc. is a Bitcoin Treasury company. The firm has adopted Bitcoin as a primary treasury reserve asset. It uses proceeds from equity and debt financing, as well as cash flows from operations, to strategically accumulate Bitcoin and advocate for its role as digital capital. Its treasury strategy is designed to provide investors varying degrees of economic exposure to Bitcoin by offering a range of securities, including equity and fixed-income instruments. It provides industry AI-powered enterprise analytics software. The company was founded by Michael J. Saylor and Sanjeev K. Bansal on November 17, 1989, and is headquartered in Tysons Corner, VA.
info.description_zh: Strategy, Inc. 是一家比特幣財務公司。該公司已採用比特幣作為主要的國庫儲備資產。它利用股權和債務融資的收益以及營運現金流來策略性地累積比特幣並宣傳其作為數位資本的角色。其財務策略旨在透過提供一系列證券（包括股票和固定收益工具），為投資者提供不同程度的比特幣經濟風險。它提供由產業人工智慧驅動的企業分析軟體。該公司由 Michael J. Saylor 和 Sanjeev K. Bansal 於 1989 年 11 月 17 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州泰森斯角。

info.description: State Street My2028 High Yield Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed fund that employs a target maturity strategy, primarily investing in high-yield corporate bonds scheduled to mature in 2028. The fund utilizes a bottom-up security selection process to overweight attractive sectors and issuers while seeking to maximize current income and preserve capital as it approaches its planned liquidation date on or about December 15, 2028.
info.description_zh: State Street My2028 高收益公司債 ETF 是一檔積極管理的基金，採用目標到期日策略，主要投資於計劃於 2028 年到期的高收益公司債。該基金利用自下而上的證券選擇流程來增持有吸引力的行業和發行人，同時尋求在接近 2028 年 12 月 15 日左右的計劃清算日期時實現當前收入最大化並保留資本。

info.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or other similar business combination, involving one or more businesses or assets. The company was founded on July 11, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是實現涉及一項或多項業務或資產的合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或其他類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年7月11日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Harvard Ave Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 15, 2024 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
info.description_zh: 哈佛大道收購公司是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、資本股票交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2024年8月15日，總部位於韓國首爾。

info.description: BioLife Solutions, Inc. engages in the development, manufacture and marketing of bio preservation tools for cells and tissues. Its product offerings include proprietary hypothermic storage and cryopreservation freeze media products for cells, tissues, and organs, generic blood stem cell freezing and cell thawing media products and custom product formulation and custom packaging services. The company was founded by Boris Rubinsky in 1987 and is headquartered in Bothell, WA.
info.description_zh: BioLife Solutions, Inc. 從事細胞和組織生物保存工具的開發、製造和行銷。其產品包括用於細胞、組織和器官的專有低溫儲存和低溫保存冷凍介質產品、通用造血幹細胞冷凍和細胞解凍介質產品以及客製化產品配方和客製化包裝服務。該公司由 Boris Rubinsky 於 1987 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州博塞爾。

info.description: Graniteshares YieldBOOST Meta ETF seeks current income; exposure to the performance of one or more exchange-traded funds whose shares trade on a U.S.-regulated securities exchange and that seek daily leverage investment results of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage of the common stock of Meta Platforms, Inc. Class A (NASDAQ: META) subject to a limit on potential investment gains. The fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in derivatives contracts that utilize the Underlying META ETF as the reference asset. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Graniteshares YieldBOOST Meta ETF 尋求當前收入；暴露於一隻或多只交易所交易基金的表現，這些基金的股票在美國監管的證券交易所進行交易，並且尋求每日槓桿投資結果為 Meta Platforms, Inc. A 類（納斯達克股票代碼：META）普通每日百分比的 2 倍（200%），但受到潛在投資收益股票的限制。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於利用基礎 META ETF 作為參考資產的衍生性合約。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Social Commerce Partners Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 11, 2025 and is headquartered in Plano, TX.
info.description_zh: Social Commerce Partners Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月11日，總部位於德克薩斯州普萊諾。

info.description: F/m Emerald Life Sciences Innovation ETF seeks long-term capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") and invests primarily in equity securities of life science companies selected by Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust, the fund's investment sub-adviser, under the supervision of the adviser. Under normal market conditions, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in equity securities issued by life science companies demonstrating innovation.
info.description_zh: F/m Emerald Life Sciences Innovation ETF 尋求長期資本增值。該基金為一檔主動式管理型交易所交易基金（「ETF」），主要投資於該基金的投資副顧問 Emerald Mutual Fund Advisers Trust 選擇的生命科學公司的股本證券，並接受顧問的監督。在正常市場條件下，該基金至少80%的淨資產投資於具有創新能力的生命科學公司發行的股本證券。

info.description: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF seeks to track the total return performance of the BlueStar Global Online Gambling, Video Gaming, and eSports Index (the "Index"). The fund employs a "passive management" investment approach designed to track the total return performance of the index. The index is a rules-based index that consists of globally-listed stocks and depositary receipts of digital entertainment companies. Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) will be invested in companies that derive at least 50% of their revenues from Digital Entertainment. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF 旨在追蹤 BlueStar 全球線上賭博、電玩和電競指數（「指數」）的總回報表現。該基金採用「被動管理」投資方式，旨在追蹤指數的總回報表現。該指數是一個基於規則的指數，由全球上市股票和數位娛樂公司的存託憑證組成。在正常情況下，至少 80% 的基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）將投資於至少 50% 收入來自數位娛樂的公司。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: IRadimed Corp. engages in the development, manufacture, marketing, and distribution of Magnetic Resonance Imaging compatible medical devices. It also provides a non-magnetic Intravenous infusion pump system that is specifically designed for use during MRI procedures. The company was founded by Roger Susi in July 1992 and is headquartered in Orlando, FL.
info.description_zh: IRadimed Corp. 從事磁振造影相容醫療設備的開發、製造、行銷和分銷。它還提供專為 MRI 手術期間使用而設計的非磁性靜脈輸液幫浦系統。該公司由 Roger Susi 於 1992 年 7 月創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州奧蘭多。

info.description: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company, which was created for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on November 23, 2020 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: GP-Act III Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運營，其創建目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2020年11月23日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Laureate Education, Inc. engages in the provision of higher educational services to undergraduate and graduate degree programs. It operates through the Mexico and Peru segments. The Mexico and Peru segments include the operation and management of universities. The company was founded by Douglas L. Becker in 1989 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Laureate Education, Inc. 致力於為本科和研究生學位課程提供高等教育服務。它透過墨西哥和秘魯部門運作。墨西哥和秘魯部分包括大學的運作和管理。該公司由 Douglas L. Becker 於 1989 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。 The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Oil & Gas ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq US Smart Oil & Gas IndexTM. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the common stocks and depository receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to provide exposure to U.S. companies comprising the oil and gas sector that have been selected based upon their liquidity and weighted based upon their cumulative score on three investing factors: volatility, value and growth. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust 納斯達克石油和天然氣 ETF 尋求與納斯達克美國智慧石油和天然氣指數™ 的價格和收益率（未計基金費用和開支）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在提供對包括石油和天然氣行業在內的美國公司的投資，這些公司是根據其流動性進行選擇的，並根據其在三個投資因素（波動性、價值和增長）的累積得分進行加權。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Stoneport Advisors Commodity Long Short ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the Stoneport Advisors Dynamic Commodity Index - Total Return. The fund invests both long and short, in highly liquid U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts that are contained in the index or that have characteristics that the Adviser believes make their return performance likely to be highly correlated to futures contracts that are contained in the index. The index is a rules-based, quantitative, long-short commodity futures index comprised of liquid, U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Stoneport Advisors 商品多空 ETF 旨在追蹤 Stoneport Advisors 動態商品指數 - 總回報（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金對流動性高的美國交易所上市實體商品期貨合約進行多頭和空頭投資，這些期貨合約包含在指數中，或具有顧問認為其回報表現可能與指數中包含的期貨合約高度相關的特徵。該指數是一種基於規則的定量多空商品期貨指數，由流動性強、在美國交易所上市的實體商品期貨合約組成。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Momentus, Inc. engages in the provision of in-space infrastructure services. It offers space transportation and in-orbit servicing. The company was founded by Mikhail Kokorich in 2017 and is headquartered in Santa Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Momentus, Inc. 從事提供太空基礎設施服務。它提供太空運輸和在軌服務。該公司由 Mikhail Kokorich 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index (the "underlying index"). The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is composed of at least 30 securities of companies in the energy sector that have powerful relative strength or "momentum" characteristics.
info.description_zh: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF 旨在追蹤 Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index（「基礎指數」）的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數由至少 30 家能源產業公司的證券組成，這些公司具有強大的相對實力或「動量」特徵。

info.description: TDH Holdings, Inc. is a real estate management company, that focuses on owning, operating and managing commercial real estate properties. It provides office services for small and medium-sized enterprises. The company was founded by Rong Feng Cui on April 22, 2002 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: TDH Holdings, Inc. 是一家房地產管理公司，專注於擁有、經營和管理商業房地產。為中小企業提供辦公服務。該公司由崔榮峰於2002年4月22日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2x Long FIG Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of FIG. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of FIG, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund manager will attempt to achieve its investment objective without regard to overall market movement or the increase or decrease in the value of FIG. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍長期Fig 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為Fig 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的每日槓桿敞口，符合FIG 的價格，與基金的投資目標一致。基金管理人將嘗試實現其投資目標，而不考慮整體市場走勢或圖值的增加或減少。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Precision Optics Corp. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and selling of optical instruments. Its products include microprecision lenses and micro medical cameras, 3D endoscopes, and robotic surgery systems. The company was founded by Richard E. Forkey in December 1982 and is headquartered in Gardner, MA.
info.description_zh: Precision Optics Corp. 從事光學儀器的設計、開發、製造和銷售。其產品包括微精密鏡頭和微型醫療相機、3D內視鏡和機器人手術系統。該公司由 Richard E. Forkey 於 1982 年 12 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州加德納。

info.description: Immunovant, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on enabling normal lives for patients with autoimmune diseases. It is developing a novel, fully human monoclonal antibody IMVT-1401 that selectively binds to and inhibits the neonatal fragment crystallizable receptor. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: Immunovant, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，專注於幫助自體免疫疾病患者恢復正常生活。該公司正在開發一種新型全人源單株抗體 IMVT-1401，可選擇性結合並抑制新生兒片段可結晶受體。該公司成立於 2018 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of XOM. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of XOM and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to XOM, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares 尋求 XOM 每日表現的 200%（未計費用和開支）的每日投資結果。在正常情况下，该基金将至少 80% 的净资产（加上任何用于投资目的的借款）投资于 XOM 证券以及掉期协议和期权等金融工具，这些金融工具结合起来为 XOM 提供 2 倍的每日杠杆敞口，这与基金的投资目标一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: CME Group, Inc. operates a derivatives marketplace, which offers a range of futures and options products for risk management. Its exchanges offer a range of global benchmark products across all major asset classes based on interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange (FX), energy, agricultural commodities and metals. It offers futures and options on futures trading across asset classes through the CME Globex platform, fixed income trading via BrokerTec and FX trading on the EBS platform. In addition, it also operates CME Clearing, a central counterparty clearing provider. The company was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: CME Group, Inc. 經營一個衍生性商品市場，提供一系列用於風險管理的期貨和選擇權產品。其交易所提供一系列基於利率、股票指數、外匯（FX）、能源、農產品和金屬的全球基準產品，涵蓋所有主要資產類別。它透過 CME Globex 平台提供跨資產類別的期貨和期貨選擇權交易，透過 BrokerTec 提供固定收益交易，並在 EBS 平台上提供外匯交易。此外，它還營運中央對手方清算提供者CME Clearing。該公司成立於 1898 年，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Shengfeng Development Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of contract logistics services. It also focuses on B2B freight transportation, cloud storage, and value-added services. The company was founded by Yong Xu Liu in 2001 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
info.description_zh: 盛豐發展有限公司是一家控股公司，從事提供合約物流服務。它還專注於B2B貨運、雲端儲存和增值服務。該公司由劉永旭於2001年創立，總部位於中國福州。

info.description: Bridgford Foods Corp. engages in the manufacture, market, and distribution of frozen and snack food products. It operates through the Frozen Food Products and Snack Food Products segments. The Frozen Food Products segment manufactures and distributes food products, including biscuits, bread dough items, roll dough items, and sandwiches. The Snack Food Products segment distributes both products manufactured by the company and third parties. The company was founded by Hugh H. Bridgford in February 1932 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
